rows.translation: 泰娜
泰西斯
基西

rows.original:
"Oh, [pc.name]!" River chirps as you pass by, hopping up from where he'd been strumming. "I've got a message for you. Big 'mander lass just dropped it off a couple of hours ago, in fact."
    
    "Big 'mander?" you echo. [vitra.met
        |Vitra? But she's all the way in Khor'minos...
    ]
    
    "Biggest frostscale salamander I've ever seen," he nods. "[var0
        | Present company excluded, anyway.
    ] A warrior born if I've ever seen one. Here."
    
    You take the missive from River when he offers it up and unfurl it. Even without reading a word, you can tell whoever sent this has money to spare: the kitten-bard's handed you a roll of the softest vellum you've ever handled, rolled up around a gold-etched baton. The handwriting is laid out thick and bold, as if with a paintbrush rather than quill, though the characters look somewhat more rounded and compact than most Belharan scripts you're familiar with. 
    
    It reads: "Hail, Champion of [var1],
    
    The tales of your exploits have spread far and wide, across even the great Greyvale Mountains where they have captivated the court of the humble realm of Tychris. It is in light of such astounding feats that the His Most Serene Highness Prince Evander extends his invitation to yourself and your companions to visit the principality and its grand palace, that you might grace the royal court with a personal recounting of your deeds whilst enjoying His Highness's most generous hospitality. There is much opportunity to be found for a champion of your accomplishments within our borders.
    
    For your convenience, a carriage has been dispatched to the caravanserai in the north-west of Hawkstone Barony's fertile valley, and will wait at your pleasure to convey you across the mountains to the Principality of Tychris.
    
    With deepest respect,
    Magister Vasko, Chancellor of the Royal Library"
    
    A royal invitation, huh? You [pc.dcb
        |give River an upnod
        |thank River
        |give River a big hug
    ] for delivering the missive and stow it in your pack. Might be worth checking out...
    
    [var2
        |"Tychris, huh?" Cait chimes in, peering over your shoulder. "They're supposed to have one of the most impressive libraries in the world. If there's anywhere in the world I can find out more about portals, it would be there. Please, [pc.name], if you're thinking about going — take me with you!"
    ]
rows.translation:
哦， [pc.name]河流在你经过时发出潺潺的声响，那只鸟从它之前停留的地方跳了起来。‘有个消息要告诉你，事实上，是那位大指挥官的女士几小时前留下的。’”

“大指挥官的女士？”你重复道。 [vitra.met
        |维特拉？可她现在应该在霍尔米诺斯啊……
    ]
    
    这是我见过的最大的霜鳞蝾螈，”他点了点头说道。[var0
        | 当然，现在在场的这些人除外。
    ] 这才是我见过的真正的勇士啊。”你从River手中接过信件，展开它。即使不读内容，你也立刻能看出：寄信人一定很有钱——这位吟游诗人送给你的，是一卷迄今为止你用过最柔软的羊皮纸，纸条被卷在一条刻有黄金图案的权杖上。 字迹粗犷有力，看起来更像是用画笔而非羽毛笔书写而成的，不过这些字符确实比你熟悉的大多数贝尔哈兰文字更加圆润、紧凑。

上面写着：“致敬，冠军…… [var1]你那些英勇事迹的故事已经传遍了四面八方，甚至传到了遥远的灰谷山脉，还在提克里斯这个宁静王国的宫廷里引起了人们的极大兴趣。正因如此，埃万德王子殿下特邀你和你的同伴们前往他的公国，参观那座宏伟的宫殿。在那里，你们可以亲自向王室成员讲述自己的冒险经历，同时享受王子殿下慷慨提供的款待。 在我们这片土地上，绝对有机会让那些认可你成就的人看到你的价值。

为了方便你的行程，我们已经派了一辆马车前往霍克斯通男爵领地肥沃山谷中的商队旅馆，那辆马车会随时等候你的到来，带你翻越群山，前往蒂克里斯公国。
    
    致以最崇高的敬意，  
皇家图书馆馆长瓦斯科大师

一份皇家邀请函，啊？你…… [pc.dcb
        |向River点头表示认可。
        |感谢河神
        |紧紧拥抱River一下
    ] 用来传递这条消息，然后把它放进你的背包里。或许值得一试……
    
    [var2
        |提克里斯，是吗？”凯特凑过来，从你肩膀后面望去，“据说他们拥有世界上最为丰富的图书馆之一。如果世界上有什么地方能让我了解更多关于传送门的信息，那肯定就是那里了。拜托了…… [pc.name]如果你正在考虑去的话——带上我吧！
    ]

rows.translation: 下一个

rows.original: A horse-drawn carriage is waiting for you here, just as the letter from Tychris described. A tall, statuesque salamander woman is leaning against one of the wooden wheels, one hand on a bronze saber at her hip and the other holding a long, thin pipe.
rows.translation: 正如提克里斯在信中描述的那样，一辆马车正在这里等着你。一位身材高挑、姿态优雅的女性正倚靠在木轮上，一只手放在腰间的青铜剑上，另一只手则拿着一根细长的烟管。

    "

rows.translation: 车厢
车厢

rows.original: Approach the coachwoman and see what she has to say.
rows.translation: 去找那位女教练，看看她有什么要说的。
rows.raw: "Approach the coachwoman and see what she has to say."

rows.original:
[flags.P_DILEMMA_CARRIAGE
        |"[pc.name]," Captain Tyna says coolly, pushing herself up to a standing position beside the driver's seat of her carriage. "Are you ready to depart yet? We've got a bit of a ride ahead of us, and the royal family's been really looking forward to your arrival."
        |As [party.yall] make your way into the ruins' courtyard, the tall salamander woman pushes herself off the carriage wheel and takes a step towards you, hand lingering on the saber at her hip. River wasn't kidding — she's certainly a big girl, towering just over seven feet tall and wearing barely anything save a short kilt and bustier. Her bare limbs are covered in smooth cyan scales, and she's got more than her share of muscle and scars both. A lengthy lizard-tail sweeps across the ground behind her, its tip flickering with an auroran light amidst the overgrown weeds at her bare feet. 
        
        "So, you're the Champion everyone's talking about," the woman says evenly, looking you up and down. The [flags.WC_CLEAR
            |boreal elves' diplomat spoke highly of you indeed."
            
            [party.has ryn
                |Etheryn glances at you, ears wiggling in delight.
            ]
            |baroness of Hawkethorne made you out to be quite the hero."
        ] The salamander nods approvingly, sliding her hand from her sword hilt to hooking a thumb through her belt. "I'm Tyna, Captain of the Guard for the Principality of Tychris. The royal family are more eager to meet you, [pc.name], than anyone I've ever escorted before. It's a bit of a trek across the Greyvales, and even more dangerous than usual these days, so I've been commanded to come and make sure you reach the city safe and sound. Assuming you're coming, that is?"
    ]
rows.translation:
[flags.P_DILEMMA_CARRIAGE
        |"[pc.name]泰娜队长冷静地说道，一边从马车的驾驶座旁站起身来。‘你们准备好了出发吗？前方的路还有些长，而王室成员们都非常期待你们的到来。
        |正如……所言 [party.yall] 当你走进废墟中的庭院时，那个高个子的蝾螈女从马车的轮子上站起来，朝你走了过来，手还搭在腰间的剑上。River确实没有开玩笑——她确实是个高个子女人，身高足有七英尺以上，身上几乎只穿着一条短裙和一件紧身上衣。 她裸露的四肢上覆盖着光滑的青色鳞片，身上也布满了肌肉与疤痕。一条长长的蜥蜴尾巴在她的身后拖地而行，尾巴的末端在杂草丛中闪烁着微弱的光芒。 
        
        所以，你就是大家口中所说的那位冠军吧，”那个女人平静地说道，上下打量着你。 [flags.WC_CLEAR
            |北境精灵的外交官确实对你评价很高。
            
            [party.has ryn
                |埃瑟琳高兴地望着你，耳朵还不停地动着。
            ]
            |霍克索恩男爵夫人把你描绘成了一个真正的英雄呢。
        ] 蝾螈赞许地点了点头，将手从剑柄上拿开，用拇指勾住了腰带。“我是蒂娜，提克里斯公国的卫队队长。王室成员们都非常渴望见到你。 [pc.name]比我以前护送过的任何人都更值得这个责任。穿过格雷瓦尔斯地区需要一段漫长的路程，而这些天那里的安全状况也比平时更加危险，因此我被命令来确保你们能够安全抵达城市。当然，前提是你们真的会来，对吧？
    ]

rows.translation: 好的。

rows.original: Let the Guard-Captain ferry you across the mountains to the city of Tychris. This will take a few days...
rows.translation: 让卫队队长带你翻越群山，前往提克里斯城吧。 这需要几天的时间……
rows.raw: "Let the Guard-Captain ferry you across the mountains to the city of Tychris. This will take a few days..."

rows.translation: 现在不行。

rows.original: You need some time before you're ready to go to Tychris.
rows.translation: 在你准备好前往提克里斯之前，还需要一些时间。
rows.raw: "You need some time before you're ready to go to Tychris."

rows.original:
"Not yet," you say, stepping back.
    
    Captain Tyna shrugs. "Fine. I'll be camped out here 'till you're ready."
    
    With that, she leans back against the wheel of the cart and pulls out a pipe.
rows.translation:
还没准备好，”你边说边后退了几步。

泰娜队长耸了耸肩：“好吧，那我就在这里等着你准备好。”

说完，她靠在马车的轮子上，掏出了一支烟斗。
rows.raw:
'
    "Not yet," you say, stepping back.
    
    Captain Tyna shrugs. "Fine. I'll be camped out here 'till you're ready."
    
    With that, she leans back against the wheel of the cart and pulls out a pipe.
    '

rows.translation: 接下来

rows.original: [party.som |"Ready," you affirm, heading towards the coach door. |"You ready?" you ask [companion.name], heading towards the coach door. |"Ready, everyone?" you ask your friends, starting towards the coach door. ] [party.has cait |"I am so ready to finally see Tychris!" Cait cheers, practically barreling you over to hop in. "I am going to just lose myself in the library!" ] [party.has arona |Arona grunts in annoyance. "Fuck, it's gonna take days to get over those mountains. [arona.isDom |Well, at least I'll have my favorite cock-warmer to keep me entertained on the way." Tyna glances between you and the orc, slowly raising an eyebrow. |Hrm, at least we're not lugging longboats on our shoulders this time."[arona.fucked | You're sure you can find some way to keep Arona's idle hands busy on the journey. ] ] ] [party.has brint |Brint looks at the coach in dismay. "I'm gonna be hunched over for how long?" ] "Alright," Tyna says, hauling herself up into the driver's seat and taking the reins. "All aboard. And keep an eye out the windows. Like I said, it's been dangerous on the road lately." You climb in and take a seat, ready for a long and, hopefully, boring trip over the mountains...
rows.translation: [party.som |准备好了，”你说道，然后朝着教练门走去。 |你准备好了吗？”你问道。 [companion.name]朝着教练车门走去。 |大家都准备好了吗？”你问着朋友们，然后朝着教练门走去。 ] [party.has cait |我是 所以 终于可以见到Tychris了！”Cait兴奋地叫道，几乎是拽着你就往里面冲去。“我一定要好好沉浸在图书馆的世界里！ ] [party.has arona |阿罗纳恼怒地哼了一声：“该死，翻过那些山脉得花上好几天的时间。 [arona.isDom |好吧，至少在旅途中，我还有我最喜欢的‘暖床工具’可以让我消遣。” 蒂娜将目光在你和那个兽人之间来回扫视，然后缓缓挑起了眉毛。 |嗯，至少这次我们不用把长船扛在肩上了。[arona.fucked | 你肯定能想办法让阿罗娜在旅途中有事可做，不让她的双手闲着。 ] ] ] [party.has brint |布林特沮丧地望着教练：“我这样弯着腰得持续多久啊？ ] 好吧，”泰娜说着，爬上驾驶座，握住了方向盘。“大家都上来吧。记得盯着窗外看——就像我说的，最近路上的情况很危险。” 你也上了车，坐好位置，准备开始这段漫长而……希望会很无聊的山区旅程……

rows.translation: 下一个

rows.original: Three days later... The Greyvale Mountains pass you by in stately majesty, their slate-gray peaks earning their name beneath caps of white snow and sporadic clumps of evergreen trees. The old road winds through the valleys and across wind-swept mountainsides, sometimes so narrow that a wheel comes inches from spinning off into the air, or grinding against sheer stone. Captain Tyna's an excellent driver, at least, steering you through the twisting paths with level-headed skill. You see the city just before sundown. The day is spent watching the craggy rock giving way to rolling green hills and farmland dotted with homesteads. Blue-scaled salamanders stare on with curiosity from porches and vegetable patches, but Captain Tyna's presence keeps them from asking any questions — she just waves them off and assures any that wander close that everything's alright. You're friends visiting from Hawkethorne, nothing to worry about. Eventually, the fields end against mighty stone walls, taller than any you've seen elsewhere in the Marches. Towers rise from it every hundred paces, bristling with arrow-slits; the gates are wide enough for a dozen men to match through abreast, but they stand open in invitation. Tyna nods to the soldiers guarding it — only half so scantily clad as their travelling captain, clad up in breastplates and plumed helms. They snap crisp salutes as Tyna drives you through and into the city proper. And a city it truly is! The paved streets are flanked by tan brick homes and businesses with tall tiled roofs and colorful shutters over their window. The occasional curious glance you got on the road becomes a growing throng around you. It seems your exploits have reached more ears than just the royal court's... The ice-cold captain commands them to keep out of your way, driving steadily towards the heart of the city. The crowd parts... and reforms behind you, forming an impromptu procession all the way to the second ring of walls surrounding the palace grounds. The pace of your carriage grinds to a crawl in the midst of such a press of bodies. You're a curiosity, a wonder, to these people. Something so out of place that folk are coming out of their homes from streets away just to see you. Little children run alongside you, waving scaly arms and technicolor tail-flames. "Popular [pc.mf |guy |lady ], aren't we?" Tyna says. "Try not to disappoint them." [pc.isCunning |"No pressure, right?" |You gulp. ] By the time the gates close heavily behind you, separating you from the crowd, it's past dark. Tyna breathes a sigh of relief as she clambers down from the carriage. She sweeps an arm up the paved path ahead, leading to a broad structure of marble and brick that crowns the hilltop in the middle of the city with a single great tower at its center. The whole place is perhaps three times the breadth of Castle Hawkstone back home, though far less imposing in its architecture — it looks more like a temple than a fortress, open and inviting to the public. At least, you suppose, when there isn't a huge crowd trying to see the hero of the hour.
rows.translation: 三天后…… 格雷维尔山脉以雄伟壮丽的姿态从你身旁掠过，那些板岩灰色的山峰在白雪的覆盖下以及零星分布的常绿树木的映衬下，更加显得气势磅礴。这条古老的道路蜿蜒穿过山谷，越过被风侵蚀的山坡，有时道路狭窄到极点，车轮几乎要悬空飞出路面，或者与陡峭的岩石擦肩而过。不过，泰娜船长驾驶技术娴熟，她冷静而熟练地引导车辆穿行在这些曲折的小路上。 你在日落前看到了这座城市。 一整天，你都在观察那些崎岖的岩石如何逐渐让位于连绵的绿丘以及散布着农舍的农田。蓝鳞蝾螈们从门廊和菜园里好奇地注视着你，但蒂娜船长的出现让它们不敢发出任何疑问——她只是向它们挥了挥手，向那些靠近她的蝾螈们保证一切都很安全。你们只是来自霍克索恩的朋友们，没什么好担心的。 最终，那些田野在巍峨的石墙前终结了——这些石墙比你在边境地区见过的任何石墙都要高耸。每隔一百步，就会有一座塔楼耸立在那里，塔墙上布满了箭孔；城门宽大到足以让十几名士兵并排通过，而且它们此刻大开着，仿佛在热情地邀请人们进入。泰娜向守卫城门的士兵们点了点头——这些士兵的装备远没有他们的队长那么精良，只穿着胸甲，头戴羽毛装饰的头盔。当泰娜带你穿过城门进入城市时，这些士兵整齐地向她敬礼。 这确实是一座城市！铺砌的街道两旁是棕褐色的砖房，各种商铺的屋顶都覆盖着高高的瓷砖，窗户上还装有色彩鲜艳的百叶窗。在路上偶尔会遇到的那些好奇的目光，渐渐汇聚成了围绕在你周围的众多人群。看来，你的冒险事迹已经传到了不仅仅是宫廷里的人耳中…… 那位冷若冰霜的队长命令他们让开道路，自己则径直朝城市的中心驶去。人群纷纷退开……然后在你的身后重新聚拢起来，形成一支临时组成的队伍，一路跟随你，直到那环绕宫殿地界的第二道城墙。 在如此密集的人群中，你的马车前进的速度简直慢得像爬行一样。对这些人来说，你就是一个奇观，一个奇迹——如此与众不同，以至于人们会从几条街之外赶来， just为了看看你。 小孩子们跟在你身边奔跑，他们挥动着布满鳞片的胳膊，尾巴上还闪烁着五颜六色的火焰。 受欢迎 [pc.mf |伙计 |女士 ]不是吗？”泰娜说道，“尽量别让他们失望吧。 [pc.isCunning |没压力吧？ |你咽了口唾沫。 ] 当大门在身后重重关上，将你与人群隔开时，天已经完全黑了。蒂娜从马车上下来，长舒了一口气。她顺着前方铺好的小路走去，那条路通向一座由大理石和砖块建造的宏伟建筑——这座建筑矗立在城市的中心，山顶上有一座高大的塔楼。 这个地方的范围大概是家乡霍克斯通城堡的三倍，但其建筑风格远没有那么雄伟壮观——它看起来更像一座寺庙，而非堡垒，对公众而言显得开放而亲切。当然，至少在没有人群挤来挤去试图一睹这位当红英雄的风采时才是这样。
rows.raw: " Three days later... The Greyvale Mountains pass you by in stately majesty, their slate-gray peaks earning their name beneath caps of white snow and sporadic clumps of evergreen trees. The old road winds through the valleys and across wind-swept mountainsides, sometimes so narrow that a wheel comes inches from spinning off into the air, or grinding against sheer stone. Captain Tyna's an excellent driver, at least, steering you through the twisting paths with level-headed skill. You see the city just before sundown. The day is spent watching the craggy rock giving way to rolling green hills and farmland dotted with homesteads. Blue-scaled salamanders stare on with curiosity from porches and vegetable patches, but Captain Tyna's presence keeps them from asking any questions — she just waves them off and assures any that wander close that everything's alright. You're friends visiting from Hawkethorne, nothing to worry about. Eventually, the fields end against mighty stone walls, taller than any you've seen elsewhere in the Marches. Towers rise from it every hundred paces, bristling with arrow-slits; the gates are wide enough for a dozen men to match through abreast, but they stand open in invitation. Tyna nods to the soldiers guarding it — only half so scantily clad as their travelling captain, clad up in breastplates and plumed helms. They snap crisp salutes as Tyna drives you through and into the city proper. And a city it truly is! The paved streets are flanked by tan brick homes and businesses with tall tiled roofs and colorful shutters over their window. The occasional curious glance you got on the road becomes a growing throng around you. It seems your exploits have reached more ears than just the royal court's... The ice-cold captain commands them to keep out of your way, driving steadily towards the heart of the city. The crowd parts... and reforms behind you, forming an impromptu procession all the way to the second ring of walls surrounding the palace grounds. The pace of your carriage grinds to a crawl in the midst of such a press of bodies. You're a curiosity, a wonder, to these people. Something so out of place that folk are coming out of their homes from streets away just to see you. Little children run alongside you, waving scaly arms and technicolor tail-flames. "Popular [pc.mf |guy |lady ], aren't we?" Tyna says. "Try not to disappoint them." [pc.isCunning |"No pressure, right?" |You gulp. ] By the time the gates close heavily behind you, separating you from the crowd, it's past dark. Tyna breathes a sigh of relief as she clambers down from the carriage. She sweeps an arm up the paved path ahead, leading to a broad structure of marble and brick that crowns the hilltop in the middle of the city with a single great tower at its center. The whole place is perhaps three times the breadth of Castle Hawkstone back home, though far less imposing in its architecture — it looks more like a temple than a fortress, open and inviting to the public. At least, you suppose, when there isn't a huge crowd trying to see the hero of the hour. "

rows.translation: 下一个
埃万德与泰西斯

rows.original:
You're announced with the blare of trumpets. A page wearing nothing but a kilt and a tabard — black with a silver dragon on its breast — shouts, "Hail, [pc.name], [pc.title][var0
        |
        | from Hawkethorne
    ]!"
    
    The noise echoes off the vaulted ceiling high above, softened by dozens of tapestries and portraits hanging from the walls. About a dozen guards and servants, all blue-scaled salamanders with as much modesty as Tyna, are in attendance in the palace's foyer — you've clearly arrived later than expected, and whatever courtiers the palace might have are long gone. You're escorted through the palace's great hall and into the throne room, facing down a pair of empty chairs backed with blue velvet sitting on a dias. 
    
    A few moments later and three more salamanders enter from a narrow door half-hidden behind the dias. The smallest of them, a slender and sickly-pale man with a golden laurel clinging to his milky brow, leads the pack while a taller and broader man in a black cloak trimmed in silver gesticulates wildly at him.
    
    "And again I must protest, my prince. These are affairs of state, not the business of southern upstarts! We are perfectly capable of solving our own problems."
    
    The third 'mander is about as tall as the robed man and even more built. The simple grey dress she's wearing does little to hide muscles and voluptuous curves alike, and her hair's a dark red in contrast to every other frostscale you've seen so far. She tweaks the robed man's frilled ear with a grunt of annoyance. "We have had this discussion ad nauseum, Magister Vasko, and our decision stands... and our guest has finally arrived, it seems."
    
    The magister clenches his jaw tight, looking your way with eyes of fury, while the other two salamanders step past their thrones and approach you. The larger woman takes the lead, offering you her hand as if equals. "Welcome to Tychris, Champion. I am Lady Tethys, and this is my husband and the lord of our proud city, Prince Evander. We've been eager to see the [pc.mf
        |man
        |lady
    ] behind the myth, the [pc.title] who brought order to [var1
        |Hawkstone
        |Njorhaalt
        |both Njorhaalt and Hawkstone
    ]."
    
    The frail salamander behind her gives you a vague nod.
    
    You shake the lady-consort's hand and say, "[pc.dcb
        |[silly
            |Peace was never an option. I'm just bringing my own order.
            |I'm just doing what needs to be done.
        ]"
        |Thank you. I'm just doing my best."
        |Aww, thanks, queenie!"
        
        The magister's lips for a tight line at your response, glancing accusingly at the consort.
    ]
    
    "Well," Tethys says, folding her hands in front of herself, "I imagine you must be quite exhausted after your trip. We'd planned a grand dinner in your honor, Champion, but given the late hour, perhaps we should show you to the guest chambers. You can tell us all about your exploits over breakfast, and then perhaps a chance to meet our royal daughter."
    
    Considering how sore your ass is after three days [var2
        |in Brint's lap
        |in Arona's lap
        |in the carriage
    ], yeah, that sounds like a fantastic idea.
    
    The furious scowling from the magister tells a different story...
rows.translation:
随着响亮的号角声，你的名字被宣告了出来。一个只穿着短裙和一件印有银色龙纹的黑色外袍的人高声喊道：“欢迎…… [pc.name], [pc.title][var0
        |
        | 来自霍克索恩
    ]喧闹声在高高的拱形天花板上回荡，不过挂在墙上的数十幅挂毯和肖像画使这种声音变得柔和了许多。在宫殿的大厅里，有大约十几名守卫和仆从在场——他们都是蓝鳞蝾螈人，和泰娜一样，也都非常低调。显然，你来得比预期的要晚，而宫殿里原本可能有的那些朝臣们，早就已经离开了。 你被引领着穿过宫殿的大厅，进入王座室。在那里，你看到一对蓝色天鹅绒靠背的空椅子摆放在高台上。 
    
    几分钟后，又有三只蝾螈从半隐藏在屏风后面的狭窄门缝中走了进来。其中最小的一只是一个身材瘦弱、面色苍白的人，他的额头上戴着金色的月桂花环；这个家伙走在队伍的最前面，而另一个身材更高、体型更魁梧、身穿银边黑色斗篷的人则不断地对他挥舞着手势，似乎在指挥什么。
    
    我必须再次抗议，我的王子。这些是国家大事，不是那些南方新贵能够插手的事情！我们完全有能力自己解决这些问题。”

第三位使者与那位穿着长袍的男子身高相仿，而且体格更为魁梧。 她穿着的那条简单的灰色连衣裙几乎无法掩盖她那结实的身材与诱人的曲线，而她的头发则是深红色的，与你迄今为止见过的所有其他颜色都截然不同。她恼怒地哼了一声，轻轻拨了拨那个穿着长袍的男子褶边装饰的耳朵。 关于这个话题，我们已经讨论得够多了，瓦斯科大师，我们的决定已经定下来了……而且看来，我们的客人也终于到来了。
    
    那位法师紧咬着牙关，怒目瞪视着你，而另外两条蝾螈则从它们的王座上走下来，向你走来。那个体型较大的女性走在前面，像对待平等的人一样向你伸出了手：“欢迎来到提克里斯，冠军。我是泰西斯女士，这是我的丈夫，也是我们这座骄傲城市的统治者——埃万德王子。我们一直都非常期待见到你。 [pc.mf
        |男人
        |女士
    ] 在背后的真相是…… [pc.title] 是谁带来了秩序…… [var1
        |霍克斯通
        |尼约哈尔特
        |尼约哈尔特和霍克斯通都……
    ]她身后的那只体弱多病的蝾螈向你微微点了点头。

你与那位女伴握了握手，然后说道：[pc.dcb
        |[silly
            |和平从来都不是一个可行的选择。我只是在努力维护自己的秩序罢了。
            |我只是在做那些必须做的事情而已。
        ]"
        |谢谢。我只是在尽自己最大的努力而已。
        |哇，谢谢你，小女王！”
听到你的回答，那位大师的嘴唇紧绷在一起，同时责备地瞥了那位王后一眼。
    ]
    
    嗯，”泰西斯双手交叠在身前说道，“我想你在长途旅行之后一定已经筋疲力尽了。我们原本打算为你准备一场盛大的晚宴，冠军，但考虑到现在已经很晚了，或许我们应该先带你去客房休息。你可以在早餐时向我们详细讲述你的冒险经历，到时候也许还能见到我们的王室女儿。”

想想看，经过三天的旅途，你的屁股肯定已经疼得厉害了吧…… [var2
        |坐在布林特的怀里
        |坐在阿罗娜的怀里
        |在马车上
    ]是啊，这听起来确实是个很棒的主意。

不过，那位大师那愤怒而阴沉的表情，却说明了另外一番意思……

rows.translation: 下一步
泰西斯

rows.original: Sleep comes easily once you're tucked into an opulent guest room on the palace's second floor, but it fails to keep you in its somnolent embrace. As comfortable as you are in the big four-posted bed, swaddled in silk sheets and warm blankets, your dreams are disturbed by strange noises. At first you think it's the howling of the wind whipping across the hill, but when you finally drag your eyes back open, the moonlight spilling through the windows shows no motion in the curtains at all. A still, cold night. And yet, the howling — that high, lilting cry in the night... You pull yourself out of bed and go to the window, half expecting to see a slavering pack of wolves baying in the courtyard. You're hardly the only person poking [pc.hisHer] head out the window, either — you catch sight of a few servants in the palace, but even down in the town below windows are starting to light up with auroran tail-flames. The whole town can hear, but nobody seems alarmed, just curious or annoyed. Like it's nothing out of the ordinary to them. The longer it goes on, though, the more it sounds like a voice. [var0 |Arona rolls over in bed behind you, grumbling "Come back to bed. I'll keep ya safe from the big bad ghosts or whatever." |Arona shoots up in bed behind you, shouting "Fucking ghosts... this place is haunted!" | ] You perk your [pc.ears], trying to pick out the source of the howling. Whatever, or whoever, is making that racket isn't far off. In fact, the longer you listen, the more sure you are it's coming from the castle itself. No, from the top of the tower! What the hell... A hard knock thumps against your door, urgent and insistent. Lady Tethys barges in before you're halfway across the room, the warmth she greeted you with replaced by steely-eyed concern. "Champion. We need to talk."
rows.translation: 一旦你躺进了宫殿二楼那间豪华的客房，入睡就会变得很容易，但这种睡意却无法让你长久沉浸在它的怀抱之中。无论你躺在那张四柱大床上，被丝绸床单和温暖的毯子包裹着，感觉有多舒适…… 一些奇怪的声音扰乱了你的梦境……起初，你以为那是风在山间呼啸的声音，但当你终于重新睁开眼睛时，透过窗户洒进来的月光清楚地显示：窗帘上没有任何动静。这是一个寂静而寒冷的夜晚。然而，那呼啸声——那种高亢而悠扬的声响，在夜空中回荡…… 你从床上爬起来，走到窗边，心里几乎期待着会看到一群狼在院子里嚎叫。其实，像你这样感到疑惑的人，不止一个。 [pc.hisHer] 你也可以把头伸出窗外——你会看到宫殿里有一些仆人，但就连下面的城镇里，窗户上也开始闪烁着极光般的尾焰。整个城镇的人都能听到这种声音，不过似乎没有人感到惊慌，只是感到好奇或有些烦躁。对他们来说，这似乎根本不是什么异常的事情。不过，这种情况持续的时间越长…… 这声音听起来就越像是一个真实的人在说话。. [var0 |阿罗娜在你身后翻了个身，嘟囔道：“回来睡觉吧。我会保护你，让你远离那些可怕的鬼魂之类的东西的。 |阿罗娜在你身后从床上猛地坐起来，大喊：“该死的鬼魂……这个地方有鬼！ | ] 你使出你的能力/技能。 [pc.ears]你试图分辨那阵嚎叫声的来源。无论是什么东西，或者是什么人在发出那种声音，它肯定就在不远处。事实上，你听得越久，就越确信那声音是从城堡里传来的——不，是从塔顶传来的！究竟是怎么回事…… 一阵急促而有力的敲门声响起。在你还没走到房间中间时，泰西斯夫人就已经冲了进来，她刚才还对你表现出热情的态度，此刻却露出了充满关切的目光。“冠军，我们得谈谈。

We need to talk." "

rows.translation: 那种噪音？

rows.original: What the hell is that noise?
rows.translation: 那到底是什么噪音？
骗了我

rows.original: That letter was a load of horseshit, wasn't it?
rows.translation: 那封信根本就是一派胡言，对吧？
rows.raw: "That letter was a load of horseshit, wasn't it?"

rows.original: Tethys sighs as the questions passes your lips, eyes falling to the floor. "That noise... is the reason my husband and I summoned you here, Champion." "Somehow I had a feeling this wasn't just a social call." "I'm sorry for the subterfuge. We did not tell Magister Vasko of our intentions, either... please do not blame him for his outburst in the hall this evening. If you wish to levy blame, direct it entirely at me, but first, my family is in desperate need of help. That noise is the sound of the most important thing in the world to me suffering: my only child, Kythie." "What's wrong with her?" you ask. "Sounds like she's being tortured." Tethys fidgets. "I... in a way, yes. Please, walk with me, Champion. Let me show you the reason we called you here. Just the two of us." That may be for the best. You gesture for the lady of the palace to lead the way, following behind [silly |the bodacious sway of her massive booty and ]her aurora-tail as she takes you from your guest quarters all the way to the very peak of the palace's tower. A pair of guards in full Tychrisian livery stand at the top with their backs to you and the consort, facing the narrow bridge between the main keep and its lone tower. Now that you're closer to the source, that haunting noise that roused you from your sleep has resolved into the frustrated roaring of a woman — one clearly just as large as Lady Tethys, bellowing with rage and slamming against the door at the far end of the bridge. It rattles on its hinges, restrained in place only by a thick wooden bolt laid across it. [pc.isCunning |"Princess locked in a tower, huh? Isn't she supposed to be in another castle — one with a dragon or something?" Tethys gives you a sidelong glance. "Were it only so straightforward as a kidnapping... or a problem solvable by force of arms, I would save her myself. Alas, it's not so simple..." |"Okay, what's going on here?" you finally insist, looking between consort and cage. "Why is your daughter locked up in a tower?" It's like something out of a children's story. ] Sighing, Tethys turns to the pair of guards and commands "Leave us. And... leave the key." Once the two 'manders-at-arms are gone, the lady-consort approaches the door, resting a gentle hand on it despite the violent hammer-blows falling on it from the other side. "Something has happened to my daughter, [pc.name]. Magister Vasko calls it a curse. Whether it's a punishment from the goddess or a hex woven by some enemy of the state, I cannot say. No matter the source, the effect is clear: my Kythie has been overcome by a lewd aggression. She cannot control herself: what started as inappropriate flirtation with Captain Tyna and her guards quickly escalated into outright throwing herself at them, and when our armsmen honorably refused her, she began trying to strongarm servants into bed... now I am afraid that if she isn't contained, she'll force herself on someone. My poor girl has lost her mind to her lusts. You can hear her in there, howling like an animal in her frustration. The whole town can hear our shame. I do not know how else to save her but to sate her. Please, Champion, you must help us."
rows.translation: 当这些话从你口中说出来时，泰西斯叹了口气，目光落在了地上。“那种声音……正是我和我丈夫将你召到这里的原因，冠军。” “不知为何，我就有一种感觉，这次召唤并不只是为了社交而已。 对于我们所采取的这些隐秘手段，我感到非常抱歉。我们也没有向瓦斯科大师透露我们的计划……请不要因此责怪他今晚在大厅里的激烈反应。如果你们想要追究责任的话，那就把全部责任都归到我身上吧。但首先，我的家人正处于极度需要帮助的境地。 那种声音，对我来说，意味着世界上最重要的人正在遭受痛苦：我的独生女儿，Kythie。” “她怎么了？”你问道，“听起来她像是在受折磨。” Tethys坐立不安：“嗯……从某种意义上来说，确实是这样。 请跟我来吧，冠军。让我向你解释我们为什么把你叫到这里来。就我们两个人而已。” 这样或许反而是最好的。你示意宫廷女官先带路，然后跟在后面。 [silly |她那结实臀部所散发出的迷人魅力…… ]她那如极光般绚丽的尾迹引领着你，从宾客区一路穿过宫殿的高塔，最终抵达塔顶。在塔顶，有两名身着提克里斯式制服的卫兵背对着你和那位王后，面朝主城堡与那座孤零零的塔楼之间的狭窄桥梁站立着。 现在你已经离声源更近了，那个将你从睡梦中惊醒的诡异声音，其实只是某个女人愤怒的吼叫声——显然，这个女人的体型也和泰西斯女士差不多大，她正愤怒地咆哮着，不断地撞击着桥那头的门。 它依靠铰链转动，仅用一根粗木栓将其固定在原位。 [pc.isCunning |公主被关在塔里了，是吗？她不应该在另一座城堡里吗——那种有龙之类的地方？” 泰西斯侧眼瞥了你一眼：“要是事情真的像绑架那么简单……或者能用武力解决的话，我早就亲自去救她了。可惜，事情并没有那么简单…… |好吧，这里到底发生了什么？”你终于忍不住问道，目光在妻子和那个笼子之间来回扫视，“为什么你的女儿会被关在塔里？” 这简直就像出自儿童故事里的场景一样。 ] 泰西斯叹了口气，转向那两名守卫，命令道：“离开我们……还有，把钥匙也留下。” 等那两名卫兵离开后，这位夫人走到门前，尽管门的另一侧不断传来猛烈的敲击声，她还是轻轻地将手放在门上。“我的女儿出事了…… [pc.name]瓦斯科大师称这是一种诅咒。无论是女神的惩罚，还是某个国家的敌人施加的魔法，我也无从知晓。但无论其来源如何，后果都是显而易见的：我的凯西被一种淫荡的侵略性所控制了。 她完全控制不住自己：起初只是与泰娜上尉及其护卫们有一些不当的调情行为，但很快就发展成了直接主动勾引他们。而当我们的武装护卫们出于礼貌拒绝她时，她又开始强迫仆人们与她发生关系。现在我担心，如果不去限制她，她可能会强行对别人做出什么。我这个可怜的女孩，已经被欲望冲昏了头脑。你可以听到她在里面的叫声，那种沮丧、愤怒，就像动物一样。 整个小镇 能感受到我们的羞愧……我不知道还有别的办法来拯救她，只能满足她的欲望。求你了，冠军，你必须帮助我们。

rows.original: Lady Tethys winces as the accusation leaves your lips. "I am so, so sorry for the deception, Champion. We did not tell Magister Vasko of our intentions, either... please, if you wish to levy blame, direct it entirely at me. But secrecy was necessary to avoid further shaming my poor daughter. She is what you're hearing from the tower, Champion — she is what has been keeping the people of Tychris awake and fearful at night. What you hear is the sound of my only child suffering. She needs your help." "Okay, slow down. What's going on here? It sounds like she's being tortured." Tethys fidgets. "I... in a way, yes. Please, walk with me, Champion. Let me show you the reason we called you here. Just the two of us." You're more than a little grumpy about false pretenses, but it's not like the one suffering sent you the horseshit letter, was it? [pc.isDK |Besides, maybe there's going to be an upside for you after all. rows.translation: 这个诅咒？

rows.original: So what exactly is this curse all about?
rows.translation: 那么，这个诅咒究竟是关于什么的呢？
rows.raw: "So what exactly is this curse all about?"

rows.translation: 基西？
去直接询问那位公主本人吧。
女神

rows.original: Tethys has mentioned her goddess more than once. Has no divine aid been forthcoming?
rows.translation: 泰西斯已经不止一次提到过她的女神。难道没有任何神灵的帮助降临吗？
rows.raw: "Tethys has mentioned her goddess more than once. Has no divine aid been forthcoming?"

rows.translation: 敌人？

rows.original: Does the royal family have any enemies that might be responsible?
rows.translation: 王室是否有什么仇敌可能会对此负责呢？
rows.raw: "Does the royal family have any enemies that might be responsible?"

rows.translation: 需要什么帮助？

rows.original: Alright, let's cut to the quick: what help is it that Lady Tethys wants from you exactly?
rows.translation: 好吧，直接说重点吧：泰西斯女士到底想要你提供什么帮助呢？
rows.raw: "Alright, let's cut to the quick: what help is it that Lady Tethys wants from you exactly?"

rows.translation: 梅登黑德？

rows.original: What's the big deal about her maidenhood?
rows.translation: 她的童贞有什么了不起的？
rows.raw: "What's the big deal about her maidenhood?"

rows.translation: 帮助她吧。

rows.original: You'll agree to help Princess Kythie vent her sexual needs — and to keep her maidenhead intact. How hard can it be?
rows.translation: 你肯定会同意帮助凯西公主满足她的性需求，同时确保她的童贞得以保留。这有什么难的呢？
rows.raw: "You'll agree to help Princess Kythie vent her sexual needs — and to keep her maidenhead intact. How hard can it be?"

rows.translation: 拒绝帮助

rows.original: You aren't going to involve yourself in this princess-in-tower story.
rows.translation: 你才不会卷入这种“公主与城堡”的老套故事里呢。
rows.raw: "You aren't going to involve yourself in this princess-in-tower story."

rows.translation: 帮助，但要保持纯洁。

rows.original: You want to help Kythie, sure, but you aren't going to take advantage of a cursed, engaged woman to do it. There has to be some other way.
rows.translation: 你确实想帮助Kythie，但总不能利用一个已经订婚且被诅咒的女性来达到这个目的吧。肯定还有其他办法的。
rows.raw: "You want to help Kythie, sure, but you aren't going to take advantage of a cursed, engaged woman to do it. There has to be some other way."

rows.translation: 让凯特来帮忙吧。

rows.original: Someone's been cursed with perpetual horniness? Well, you have the perfect solution in the form of a slutty pink cat.
rows.translation: 是不是有人被诅咒了，永远都欲火中烧？那么，有一只淫荡的粉色猫咪，正好能为你提供完美的解决办法。
rows.raw: "Someone's been cursed with perpetual horniness? Well, you have the perfect solution in the form of a slutty pink cat."

rows.original: Too bad you don't have Cait around to help, she'd be perfect for this.
rows.translation: 真可惜你身边没有Cait来帮忙，她做这个再合适不过了。
rows.raw: "Too bad you don't have Cait around to help, she'd be perfect for this."

rows.original:
"So what exactly has this curse done to her?"
    
    Tethys gestures helplessly at the door. "You can hear her, can't you? She's gone mad, consumed by unnatural lusts. At this point we've had to cage her, for fear that she'll force herself one of the servants. My poor daughter can barely string three words together without cursing, and now she barely sleeps. All she does is throw herself against the doors and barred windows, trying to break free so she can... can slake herself on someone; on anyone."
    
    "Is that all?"
    
    "N-no, I suppose. Kythie's a strong girl — she takes after me, as you can no doubt imagine — but the curse seems to have made her even stronger. It took four warriors to wrestle her down and drag her to the tower. She broke poor Ser Ephenos's arm in the process."
    
    So she's stronger, more aggressive, and so horny she can't think straight. Gotta admit, that's not an entirely unfamiliar host of symptoms these days... but it's not going to make her easy to deal with, either.
    
    "Does she have any calm periods?"
    
    Tethys shakes her head. "Only when she's exhausted herself so completely that she passes out. And the moment she wakes..."
    
    So no, not really.
rows.translation:
那么，这个诅咒究竟对她做了什么？”

泰西斯无奈地指向门口：“你们能听到她的声音吧？她已经疯了，被那些违背自然的欲望所控制。现在我们不得不把她关起来，生怕她会强迫某个仆人成为她的牺牲品。 我可怜的女儿现在连说三句话都不免要骂几句脏话，而且她几乎睡不着觉。她整天只是不停地撞门、砸窗，试图挣脱束缚，只为了……能找个人发泄情绪；随便哪个人都行。就这些吗？”

“不……我想是的。凯西是个坚强的女孩——她很像我，这一点你们应该能想象得到——但那个诅咒似乎让她变得更加强大了。竟然需要四名战士才能把她制服并拖到塔里去。 在这个过程中，她把可怜的埃菲诺斯爵士的胳膊弄断了。

所以，她变得更加强大、更具攻击性，而且欲望如此强烈，以至于已经无法理智思考了。不得不承认，这些症状在如今已经不算什么新鲜事了……但这也意味着她变得更加难以对付了。
    
    她有没有什么平静的时候？”

泰西斯摇了摇头：“只有当她把自己累得昏过去的时候，才会有一会儿平静。而一旦她醒来……”

所以，其实并没有什么平静的时候。
rows.raw:
'
    "So what exactly has this curse done to her?"
    
    Tethys gestures helplessly at the door. "You can hear her, can't you? She's gone mad, consumed by unnatural lusts. At this point we've had to cage her, for fear that she'll force herself one of the servants. My poor daughter can barely string three words together without cursing, and now she barely sleeps. All she does is throw herself against the doors and barred windows, trying to break free so she can... can slake herself on someone; on anyone."
    
    "Is that all?"
    
    "N-no, I suppose. Kythie's a strong girl — she takes after me, as you can no doubt imagine — but the curse seems to have made her even stronger. It took four warriors to wrestle her down and drag her to the tower. She broke poor Ser Ephenos's arm in the process."
    
    So she's stronger, more aggressive, and so horny she can't think straight. Gotta admit, that's not an entirely unfamiliar host of symptoms these days... but it's not going to make her easy to deal with, either.
    
    "Does she have any calm periods?"
    
    Tethys shakes her head. "Only when she's exhausted herself so completely that she passes out. And the moment she wakes..."
    
    So no, not really.
    '

rows.translation: 这个诅咒？

rows.original:
"What can you tell me about Kythie, before the curse?"
    
    "Everything," Tethys answers, smiling sadly. "She's my baby. My pride and joy. Never far from me... even now, I spend much of my days sitting here, hoping that I can sooth her. Ah, but where to start? My daughter takes after me in body and spirit: she's tall and strong, a warrior born at first glance, but she has her father's gentle heart. I turned her to athletics instead of the sword when her sweet disposition became clear: she loves nothing more than to run, to throw discus and javelins, and to wrestle with the guards. She won the the Tychathalon this year... I was so proud to present my own daughter with the aurum wreath of victory."
    
    The consort casts a sorrowful glance towards the door. "Please believe me, Champion: she is a good-natured young woman, full of more warmth than any other frostscale I've met. Someday she'll make a magnificent sovereign, and a loving wife and mother. But in her current state, she cannot rule, much less marry... and our entire line rests with her. My poor girl..."
    
    "She has no siblings?"
    
    "No." Tethys shakes her head. "It was an ordeal just to have the one, and the goddess hasn't blessed Evander and I with another. One beautiful baby girl was all I needed, though. Our little miracle."
    
    You have to ask, you suppose, "[pc.isBimbo
        |Doesn't she have like, a boyfriend or cutie girlfriend to take all this out on?
        |She doesn't have any paramours to vent this frustration out on, I take it?
    ]"
    
    The lady of the palace stiffens somewhat, eyeing the door. "No. This isn't Khor'minos. It doesn't do for high nobility for fornicate so freely, and... and Kythie's hand has long been promised to another. The second prince of Felurze, one of our sister-cities to the south, will come north to be her consort when he comes of age next year. Until then, for the sake of her bloodline's purity, we've kept her away from men."
    
    "I see."
    
    That raises the question of what exactly you can do for her, then...
rows.translation:
在那个诅咒降临之前，你能告诉我关于凯西的什么吗？”

“一切，”泰西斯悲伤地笑着回答，“她是我的宝贝，我的骄傲和快乐。她从来都不会离开我……即使现在，我也常常坐在这里，希望能安抚她。 啊，但该从哪里说起呢？我的女儿无论在外表还是性格上都与我很像：她身材高挑、体格强壮，乍一看就像一名战士，但她却继承了我父亲那颗温柔的心。当发现她天性热爱运动而非武艺时，我就让她选择了田径而不是剑术——她最喜欢做的事情就是跑步、掷铁饼和标枪，还有与守卫们进行摔跤训练。 她今年赢得了提卡塔隆大赛……能够为自己的女儿戴上这顶胜利的黄金花环，我感到无比自豪。

那位王后悲伤地望向门口，说道：“请相信我，冠军：她是个心地善良的年轻女子，她身上散发出的温暖，远超过我曾经遇到的任何一位霜鳞族成员。 总有一天，她会成为一位伟大的女王，一位充满爱心的妻子和母亲。但以她现在的状况，她既无法统治国家，更无法结婚……而我们的整个家族命运都寄托在她身上。我可怜的孩子……

“她没有兄弟姐妹吗？
    
    不。”泰西斯摇了摇头，“能生下那个孩子就已经是莫大的幸运了。女神并没有赐予埃万德和我另一个孩子。不过，一个可爱的女婴就已经足够了——我们的小奇迹。”

你或许会忍不住问：[pc.isBimbo
        |她难道没有男朋友或者可爱的女朋友可以倾诉这些烦恼吗？
        |我想，她没有任何可以倾诉这种沮丧情绪的人吧？
    ]宫殿中的那位女士微微一僵，目光投向门口。“不，这里不是科尔米诺斯。对于高等贵族来说，如此随意地私通是不被允许的……而且，凯西的手早已许给了别人。我们南方的一个姐妹城市——费卢尔泽的次子，明年成年后就会来到北方，与她成婚。 在那之前，为了保持她血脉的纯正，我们一直让她远离男性。”

“我明白了。”

那么，这就引出了一个问题：你们究竟能为她做些什么呢？

rows.translation: 这个诅咒？

rows.original: "Your goddess... have you had no luck with her clergy?" "No," Tethys sighs, lips drawing taut. "Tychris is Nareva's stronghold in the north, the most devout of all her cities. Long have we kept her faith since the days of Evander's ancestor who fought for her in the Godswar, and yet her clerics are no more able to help her than Magister Vasko. They have performed exorcisms and purification rituals, but each brings less relief than the last. Even a member of the blessed Order Astrida came to examine her. I will not soon forget the humiliation of watching one of Nareva's chosen having to overpower my child, fending off unwanted gropes and tail-thrusts while she attempted to draw out the curse. She succeeded. We were thrilled... for a few days, until it returned. The Lorekeeper of the Order came next, repeated the process, and again, days later, my daughter began to succumb. The Astrida say they are investigating and assure us of their ability to help her... but days go by, and no word comes. They refuse to see me now. Refuse my husband's summons! All communication with the Order comes back with empty assurances!" Tethys groans. "Should the church find a solution, I will sing their praises to the heavens for the rest of my days. But until then, I cannot bear to see my daughter suffer so." [var0 |"The Order hasn't been helpful?" Tethys shakes her head so violently that the motion carries through all the way to that prodigious bosom of hers. "No! Normally, breaking a curse like Kythie's would be exactly the sort of thing I would expect the Order to be used for, but the Lorekeeper and her paladins have declined to answer our summons after the second attempt. They claim they are researching, and that we cannot rush them! Would that I were so impious, I would have the Lorekeeper dragged here to answer for the goddess's silence! But if Kythie's suffering is not already Nareva's punishment, then surely some worse fate would befall us all if I did." |"Who are these Order Astrida?" you ask. Tethys takes a breath to settle herself. "Ah, you are an outsider, of course. You'll see the occasional salamander with coal-dark scales if you linger in the city — they are the divine servants of Nareva: our goddess of knowledge, strategy, and the arcane. Every blackscale is a hand-sculpted champion of the goddess, crafted in her likeness from the womb to become a peerless mage-knight. The Astrida keep a stronghold here in the city, from whence the goddess sends them out to protect her temples and to stamp out sorcerers that stray from the path of righteousness, those who turn Nareva's gifts to evil. Normally, breaking a curse like Kythie's would be exactly the sort of thing I would expect the Order to be used for, but..." She sighs. "Either we have offended the goddess in some way and are suffering her punishment, or whatever caused this curse is so powerful that even Nareva's chosen are mystified by it. I wish I knew which, but the Lorekeeper and her paladins have withdrawn to their keep and have fallen silent to our summons. Would that I were so impious, I would have the Lorekeeper dragged here to answer for the goddess's silence! But if Kythie's suffering is not already Nareva's punishment, then surely some worse fate would befall us all if I did." ] [pc.isCunning |The consort is growing desperate indeed to even countenance the idea. Breaching a temple, especially a paladin stronghold, isn't something to be taken lightly even for the mightiest of kings. But why in the world can't the goddess of magic's servants help her? ]
rows.translation: 你的女神……你派去的牧师们难道一点作用都没有吗？” “没有，”泰西斯叹息道，嘴唇紧绷着，“提克里斯是纳雷瓦在北方的据点，也是所有城市中最虔诚的地方。自从埃万德的祖先在神战中为她而战以来，我们一直维护着那里的信仰，然而，那些牧师们同样无法帮助她，就像瓦斯科大师一样。 他们进行过驱邪仪式和净化典礼，但每一次都带来的缓解效果越来越差。就连那位备受尊敬的阿斯特里达教团成员也来为她诊治过。我永远忘不了那种羞辱感——看着纳雷瓦挑选出来的人不得不强行压制我的孩子，阻止那些不必要的触碰和骚扰，而她自己也在努力解除那诅咒。 她成功了。我们有几天都欣喜若狂，直到那种情况再次出现。随后，教团的典籍守护者采取了同样的措施，几天后，我女儿又一次开始出现那种症状。阿斯特里达家族表示他们正在调查此事，并向我们保证他们有能力帮助她。……然而日子一天天过去，却始终没有任何消息。他们现在拒绝见我，也拒绝接受我丈夫的召唤！与那个组织的所有沟通都只是得到一些空洞的承诺而已！ 泰西斯叹了口气：“如果教会能找到解决办法，我余生都会为他们歌功颂德。 但在那之前，我实在无法忍受看到我的女儿遭受这样的痛苦。 [var0 |这个组织根本没有起到任何帮助作用吗？” 泰西斯剧烈地摇了摇头，这一动作甚至让她那丰满的胸部也跟着晃动起来。“不！通常情况下，解除像凯西这样的诅咒正是我期望这个组织能够发挥作用的地方，但是那位知识守护者以及她的圣骑士们，在我们第二次发出召唤之后，竟然拒绝回应我们的请求。 他们声称自己正在进行研究，所以我们不能催促他们！要是我也这么无礼的话，真该把那位知识守护者拖到这里来，让他为女神的沉默负责！但是，如果凯西所遭受的痛苦还不是纳雷瓦对我们的惩罚，那么如果我真那么做了，我们所有人肯定都会遭遇更可怕的命运。" |这些‘秩序阿斯特拉达’的人都是谁？”你问道。 泰西斯深吸一口气，平静下来后回答道：“啊，你当然是个外人。如果你在城里闲逛，偶尔会看到一些皮肤呈煤黑色、外形像蝾螈的生物——它们就是纳雷瓦的神圣仆从。纳雷瓦是我们的女神，掌管知识、战略与神秘力量。 每一名黑鳞战士都是女神亲手塑造的勇士，他们依照女神的形象被创造出来，从而成为无与伦比的法师骑士。阿斯特里达家族在这座城市中驻扎着据点，正是从这里，女神派遣这些战士去保护她的神庙，消灭那些偏离正义之路的巫师——那些将纳雷瓦赐予他们的力量用于邪恶之人。 通常来说，解除像Kythie这样的诅咒，正是我期望教会能够发挥作用的地方……但是…… 她叹了口气：“要么是我们以某种方式得罪了女神，因此正在承受她的惩罚；要么就是导致这个诅咒的力量太过强大，就连Nareva挑选出来的人也对此感到困惑不已。 我真希望自己能知道是哪一种情况，但是那位知识守护者以及她的圣骑士们已经退回他们的据点，对我们的召唤置若罔闻。要是我再不敬一些的话，真该把那位知识守护者拖到这里来，让她为女神的沉默负责！ 但如果凯西所遭受的痛苦还不是纳雷瓦对我们的惩罚，那么如果我这么做了，我们所有人肯定都会遭遇更糟糕的命运。 ] [pc.isCunning |这位王后确实越来越绝望了，甚至都不愿意考虑这个想法。攻破一座寺庙，尤其是骑士团的据点，即便是最强大的国王也绝不能掉以轻心。但究竟为什么呢…… 不能 魔法女神的仆从们会帮助她吗？ ]

rows.original:
"Do you have any idea who might have cursed her?" you ask. "Anybody you'd call an enemy?"
    
    Tethys takes a moment to consider. "None that could pull off something so daring! Tychris was once a powerful and influential polis before the Godswar, but since the fall of Belhar we've been left as a frontier town without an empire. There's been little back-stabbing political machination in my lifetime save for the rare baronial squabbling over land, and that's mostly been resolved with amicable duels or marriages. There are bandits that harry our lands from the south, gnolls and ogres too, but I've lead more sorties against them than any other lord and I can safely say I've never seen more than a petty shaman among them. No open foe of the city could inflict a curse that would befuddle Nareva's own servants, surely."
    
    "And hidden foes?"
    
    The consort shrugs. "If we have hidden foes, Champion, then they are hidden from me — I know of none. I was a warrior before I was a mother; I leave spies and skullduggery to Vasko. He has the peasant cunning for such things. The only spellcasters of substantial power in the city are Nareva's holy Lorekeeper, my own court Magister, and Lady Zainem; she's something of a sorceress-philosopher. Eccentric, but that mountain of muscle would sooner break me over a knee for suggesting her guilt than she'd raise a spell against an innocent woman. I would eat my own tail before accusing any of them of conspiracy against the crown."
    
    "I see."
rows.translation:
你有没有想过，究竟是谁诅咒了她？”你问道，“有没有什么你认为是敌人的人呢？”

泰西斯沉思了一会儿，然后回答道：“没有谁有这样的胆量做出这种事！在神战之前，提克里斯曾经是一个强大而富有影响力的城邦，但自从贝尔哈尔陷落之后，我们就变成了一个没有所属帝国的边陲小镇。 在我的有生之年中，除了偶尔发生的那些关于土地的贵族争斗之外，几乎没有什么暗中算计和政治阴谋。而这些争斗大多都是通过友好的决斗或婚姻来解决的。当然，也有强盗从南方侵扰我们的领地，还有地精和食人魔，但我带领军队出征对抗他们的次数比任何其他领主都要多。可以肯定地说，在这些敌人中，我从未见过有什么高阶的萨满或巫师。 这座城市里，没有任何公开的敌人能够施展出那种连纳雷瓦自己的仆从都会陷入混乱的诅咒吧。
    
    还有隐藏的敌人吗？”

那位妃子耸了耸肩：“如果真有隐藏的敌人，冠军，那他们肯定是对我隐藏起来了——我根本不知道有这样的敌人。在我成为母亲之前，我曾经是一名战士；这类间谍活动和小动作，就交给瓦斯科吧。他在这些事情上可有着农民特有的狡猾劲头。 这座城市里唯一拥有真正强大力量的施法者，就是纳雷瓦的神圣知识守护者、我自己的宫廷法师，以及扎伊奈姆女士——她可以说是一位兼具魔法师与哲学家身份的女性。她性格古怪，但只要我敢暗示她有罪，那庞大的肌肉力量绝对会立刻把我打倒，而她绝不会对一个无辜的女性施展任何魔法。 在我指责他们中的任何一个人密谋反对王室之前，我宁愿先吃掉自己的尾巴。
    
    我明白了。

'

    Tethys takes a moment to consider. "None that could pull off something so daring! Tychris was once a powerful and influential polis before the Godswar, but since the fall of Belhar we've been left as a frontier town without an empire. There's been little back-stabbing political machination in my lifetime save for the rare baronial squabbling over land, and that's mostly been resolved with amicable duels or marriages. There are bandits that harry our lands from the south, gnolls and ogres too, but I've lead more sorties against them than any other lord and I can safely say I've never seen more than a petty shaman among them. No open foe of the city could inflict a curse that would befuddle Nareva's own servants, surely."
    
    "And hidden foes?"
    
    The consort shrugs. "If we have hidden foes, Champion, then they are hidden from me — I know of none. I was a warrior before I was a mother; I leave spies and skullduggery to Vasko. He has the peasant cunning for such things. The only spellcasters of substantial power in the city are Nareva's holy Lorekeeper, my own court Magister, and Lady Zainem; she's something of a sorceress-philosopher. Eccentric, but that mountain of muscle would sooner break me over a knee for suggesting her guilt than she'd raise a spell against an innocent woman. I would eat my own tail before accusing any of them of conspiracy against the crown."
    
    "I see."
    '

rows.translation: 需要什么帮助？

rows.original: "So why exactly are you concerned about her maidenhood? Most people in the Marches aren't exactly prudish." "Most, maybe," Tethys admits. "But east of the Greyvales, things are different. We've been on our own out here for centuries. Bloodlines matter more here, social standing and tradition matters more here. Tychris, like all the city-states around us, suffers from thin ruling blood. Ensuring that the royal lineage continues is important to us. More than in most places, where there's always a half-dozen spare heirs." "You don't sound particularly enthused." The lady-consort takes a deep, slow breath — a hard contrast to the roaring coming through the door beside her. "I was enthused to find her a partner that would strengthen the Tychrisian bloodline, and the oaths we made with his parents years ago called for Kythie to be a maiden when her betrothed arrives here in less than a year's time." "Tell me about him? You're asking me to fuck his fiance, after all." That earns you a deep grimace from Tethys. "Lazaran en Felurze, second heir to a city of salamanders and elves a week's journey south from here. He's a bit younger than my girl, just seventeen today, but he's strong of body and character by all accounts. As close to Kythie's equal as any young man can be. He'll make a fine consort when he's older, I am sure." "And do you think he'll be keeping himself pure for Kythie?" Well that question certainly makes Tethys uncomfortable. The curvaceous [silly |salamilfder |salamander ] shifts her considerable weight from one foot to the other, and her tail flame dims behind her. "He's still too young to worry about such things, but... my friends in Felurze have whispered that his heart has belonged to a cleric of Velun since childhood, as Evander's belonged to me. But it is not meant to be. The boy is destined to rule, and he knows that as surely as Kythie does. I am sure." She doesn't sound entirely convinced, but then again, does it really matter? The future prince isn't the one bearing any royal heirs, there's no chance of the wrong seed taking in him.

rows.original:
"I can't help you," you say, turning towards the stairs.
    
    "But-" Tethys says, eyes welling up. "Who can, if not you? The clergy, the Astrida, our own court magister... nobody can seem to uncover what's befallen my little girl."
    
    That's not your problem. You start the long descent, trying to ignore the princess's howls... and the lady-consort's wails of despair. All there is to do is gather your things while the royal family's not in a position to interfere with you further.

rows.translation: 下一个

rows.original:
You give the queen a steady nod. "Okay. I'll do it."
    
    Relief is palpable on her face. The large woman leans back against the door and circles her heart with a thumb, murmuring a prayer of thanks to Nareva. "You are goddess-sent, Champion. I... I never thought I would be so relieved to hear someone would lay my daughter outside her marriage bed, but I am beyond desperate. Thank you."
    
    Tethys unlocks the door, sliding the heavy deadbolt free. If she didn't have her weight on it, another of her daughter's screeching pounces would surely have knocked it open; even still, the consort's eyes widen in surprise. "She's so strong. I hope you can match her, Champion. Be quick!"
    
    The door is yanked open, and you find yourself shoved through by strong, scaled hands. It locks behind you again a moment later, deadbolt thumping into place with finality... and leaving you alone in the tower with the salamander princess.
rows.translation:
你坚定地向女王点了点头：“好的，我会去做的。”

她脸上的忧虑立刻消失了。那位身材高大的女子靠在门上，用拇指轻轻按着自己的胸口，喃喃地向纳雷瓦祈祷着表示感谢：“你是女神派来拯救我们的，冠军。 我……我从没想过，听到有人愿意让我的女儿远离婚姻的束缚，我会感到如此欣慰。我真的已经绝望到极点了，谢谢你们。”

泰西斯推开了门，将沉重的插销拔了出来。如果她没有用自己的体重压在插销上，她女儿那尖锐的叫声肯定会让门被撞开；即便如此，这位王后还是惊讶地瞪大了眼睛。 她太强了……希望你能和她匹敌，冠军。快一点！”

门被猛地推开，一股有力的力量将你推了进去。片刻之后，门又重新关上了，门闩被牢牢地锁在原位。然后就把你独自留在塔里，和那条火蜥蜴公主在一起。

rows.original:
Princess Kythie certainly takes after her mother.
    
    She's maybe two fingers shorter than the consort and not nearly so voluptuous, but you can easily see that Tethys might have looked like this in her youth: Kythie's all tensed, well-built muscle and supple curves adorned with blue scales. Eyes so dilated you can barely see their red coloration stare at you from under an unkempt mane of cobalt hair. Her cheeks are flushed; hell, so is most of her body — her entirely naked body, baring a hefty pair of tits and soaked, muscular thighs at you without a hint of shame. 
    
    The princess is in a low crouch, perched on the side of the bed and breathing heavily, eating you alive with those hungry eyes. 
    
    "You..." she growls, tensing. "Fuck. Now."
    
    Well, that is what you came here to do, but you can tell the princess is about to leap at you. If you don't do something, you're the one that's going to get broken in here!

rows.original:
"Okay, big girl," you say, adjusting your footing and bracing for her. "Let's go."
    
    Kythie howls with feral fury, hurling herself off the bed and barreling into you like a stampeding mare. You skid back with the impact, grabbing the naked princess around the middle and leaning into her with all your weight. She snarls, clawing at your back and lashing her tail out every which way — no playing fair in this match, you guess. "Fuck! Fuck now, fuck me now!" she hisses between heaving pants, trying to get leverage to push you down. 
    
    [var0
        |It's hard to tell if you're actually stronger than Kythie, but you've actually got your wits about you and have the stamina to hold her off until you see an opening to flip this around. Her foot slips, claws gouging the wood, and that's all the opportunity you need to twist the big 'mander around and send her ass-first onto the floor. The room shudders under her weight crashing down.
        
        She's not going down without a fight, though. Tethys wasn't kidding about this girl being a wrestler: when you go to pin her, she grabs you with her legs and throws you to the side. The wind belts out of your chest as you slam into the bedside, but you're able to recover quick enough to roll aside before Kythie can land her pussy right on your face. Later, girl, damn!
        
        Kythie tumbles past you and onto the bed, rolling into a low crouch much like you found her. Her heavy breathing's taken on a less manic edge, though — more tired, laboring. Good. You kip up and go at her again, tackling Kythie down. This time you manage to get her wrists, pinning them to the bed above her head. She tries to kick at you, but you're in too close for her to get any power behind her legs; all that muscle's no good with nowhere to go. Eventually you're able to get your knees in, pushing her legs down on the bed. 
        
        "F-f-fuuuuck! I need fuck!" the princess howls, thrashing around in your arms. "Pleeeeease!"
        
        "I will," you tell her. "Now calm down and let me."
        
        A helpless whimper escapes Kythie's lips, but the resistance bleeds out of her. Dominance established. Now what?
        |Kythie's definitely got the advantage of brawn on you — that much becomes evident in a hurry. She huffs and puffs and puts her legs into it, and no matter how hard you push back, she's getting the upper hand. In desperation, you try and juke to the side, letting her momentum carry her past you, but her mother wasn't kidding about how skilled this amazonian princess is: Kythie catches on in a heartbeat, grabbing you by the shoulders and slamming you back against the door. 
        
        The whole room shudders with the impact, and your vision's filled with stars. Before you can blink the haze away, you feel a pair of strong, clawed hands gripping your shoulders and pinning you to the floor. Gods, she's warm — who the hell decided to call them frostscales? Her whole body's a furnace, and the most intense of the heat is radiating from her loins, billowing out like a furnace.
        
        "Fuck. Now."
        
        Uh oh.

rows.original:
"Champion!" Tethys says as you approach. "Please, come here. I think they've finally settled down."
    
    Finally is right, it's been long enough. Tethys is right, though, the sounds of raw, sexual violence that had kept the town up through the night have fallen silent. 
    
    There's a soft knock on the door, and when Tethys unbars it, you're treated to the sight of Cait standing in tattered clothes, her hair disheveled, covered from head to toe in bite and claw marks. You blink back your own surprise — normally Cait's downright indomitable. "Are you okay?"
    
    "Yeah. Yeah, I'm fine," Cait says. He voice is as weary as she looks, but the catgirl gives you a thin smile. "And so is she."
    
    You glance past your companion to a four-poster bed in the middle of the cell. A tall, suntanned salamander is sprawled out on it wearing nothing but her own bright blue scales. She's built like an athlete, though you can see she gets her chest from her mother, and is absolutely drenched in sweat. Cait certainly gave as good as she got, especially from a bigger woman. 
    
    "Is my daughter-"
    
    "Cured? No. Just resting," Cait says. "With your permission, Lady Tethys, I'll keep visiting her until we find a proper cure. I can't promise more than giving her peace."
    
    Tethys sighs with relief. "That will be enough, sister. Thank you."
    
    To you, Cait says, "Give me a few to get cleaned up, and I'll be back with you. Maybe we can talk to Kythie after?"
    
    Couldn't hurt.

If Prince Lazaran discovers the curse — or your method of controlling it — the future of our entire realm will be doubly imperilled. Please, Champion. rows.translation: 你用指关节敲了敲门：“我搞完了。” 过了一会儿，门锁才“咔嗒”一声打开，你被请了出去。 [var0 |那位女伴脸上带着极其不悦的表情迎了上来，双手叉腰，背上的火焰也黯淡成了微弱的余光。[pc.name]冠军。你……你 [pc.mf |混蛋 |贱人 ]你以为我们不会发现你做的事情吗！？” 那位王妃的目光仿佛能刺穿你的身体，她声音中的愤怒简直让人感觉得到。“我们信任你！你……你本可以做得更好的。 没什么但是你却玷污了我的女儿！我的宝贝。你毁了她的人生！[pc.dcb |你骗我，就是为了让我来到这里。所以现在我们扯平了。嘿，你大可以也骗骗她未来的丈夫嘛。 |我应该没那么重要吧？他们怎么可能知道呢！？ |但如果这样感觉很棒的话……我相信我未来的丈夫肯定不会介意的。 ] 泰西斯咆哮道：“你根本不明白。我们曾经立下过誓言…… [pc.name]我们承诺会献上一位处女作为祭品，而费卢尔泽的神父们也会照做。 知道 事实并非如此。我们现在的所作所为已经是一种卑鄙的欺骗，而现在，就连最起码的诚信也早已被我们抛弃了。庆幸吧，你只是另一个领域的冠军而已！你所做的事情，对那些地位较低的人来说，无异于致命的打击。 [pc.mf |男人 |女性 ]快滚，别再回来。” 这个威胁再明显不过了。你最好尽快离开宫殿，甚至离开整个城市。 |[flags.KYTHIE_MET |泰西斯依旧像往常一样，在塔室的外面等待着。“她怎么样了，冠军？凯西……她没事吧？” 你只是简单地点了点头：“她没事。” 泰西斯松了一口气：“谢天谢地。哦！这一切什么时候才能结束？这种疯狂还会再折磨她多久呢？” 你摇了摇头：“我们会想出办法的。而在那之前，每当她需要安慰的时候，我都会陪在她身边。 |当你走出塔楼的囚室时，泰西斯脸上明显带着担忧和羞愧的神情。“你……她……她……”她强忍住情绪，停顿了一下，深吸了一口气，才问道：“冠军，你没事吧？” 你点了点头：“她没事。” 她脸上顿时露出了如释重负的表情：“感谢女神。我真为让你经历了这些而感到抱歉，冠军。我无法想象那一定很不好受。 [pc.isDK |其实确实是这样，”你说，“她是个很难管教的人，但也是那种以积极的方式让人头疼的人。 |你可能会不同意，但在和凯西的母亲交谈时，这样的说法无疑是不合适的。“没关系，我很乐意帮忙。 ] [pc.isDK |泰西斯看了你一眼……然后笑了。“我明白了。好吧，我很高兴我们找到了合适的人。 |我很高兴。我们真的非常感谢你的帮助，冠军。 ] 那么，接下来该怎么做呢？” 泰西斯将手放在那扇将她与女儿隔开的门上。“你让凯西得到了一些安宁，为此我已感激不尽。但是，如果你能再帮助我们一次，冠军，我们将永远感激你——如果你能找到…… 为什么 发生了这样的事情，或者该如何阻止它的继续发生。当然，如果你能找到一种更彻底的方法来缓解我们女儿的痛苦，王室一定会给予你丰厚的奖励…… [pc.isDK |皇家赐予的钱固然不错，但如果你再拖延下去，谁知道你还能偷偷和她的女儿继续这种关系多久呢。不过，即使你并不真的打算去调查，至少也应该装作在认真调查的样子，这样才能让人信服。 ]我需要仔细搜查整个宫殿以及周围的区域，看看凯西可能在哪里。” “当然可以。我会确保我们的守卫和仆人们都知道要尽他们所能帮助你。冠军，你能来到这里，我们真的感到如释重负。 确实如此。如果有什么我们可以帮助您完成调查的事情，请随时告知。我们只希望您能保持谨慎。如果拉扎兰王子发现了这个诅咒，或者您控制它的方法，我们整个王国的未来将会面临巨大的危险。 拜托了，冠军。就像你曾经帮助过我们一样，现在也帮帮我们吧。 [var1 |尼奥尔哈尔特 |霍克索恩 |尼约尔哈尔特和霍克索恩，两者都是…… ]你总能在那件事发生之前弄清楚这个诅咒的真相吧。 ] ]
rows.raw: ' You rap your knuckles on the door. "I'm done." A moment passes before the deadbolt clicks, and you're ushered out. [var0 |You're greeted by a deeply sour look on the lady-consort's face, hands on her hips and tail-flame dimmed to a faint ember. "[pc.name]. Champion. You... you [pc.mf |bastard |bitch ]! Did you think we wouldn't notice what you've done!?" The lady-consort's staring daggers through you, and the rage in her voice is palpable. "We trusted you! You... you could have done nothing, but instead you've defiled my daughter! My baby. You've ruined her future!" "[pc.dcb |And you lied to me to get me to come out here. So now we're even. Hey, you can just lie to her future husband, too." |I can't be that big of a deal, can it? How would they even know!?" |But if felt so good... I'm sure future-hubby won't mind." ] Tethys snarls. "You don't understand. We made oaths, [pc.name]. We promised a virgin daughter, and the priests of Felurze will know that it isn't so. What we're doing now is already a blackhearted deception, but now even the thinnest veneer of oathkeeping is beyond us. Be thankful that you are the champion of another realm! What you have done would be the death of a lesser [pc.mf |man |woman ]. Begone, and do not come back." The threat is clear as day. You ought to make yourself scarce in the palace, if not the city, as soon as possible. |[flags.KYTHIE_MET |Tethys is still waiting outside the tower chamber, same as ever. "How is she, Champion? Is... is Kythie alright?" You just nod. "She's fine." Tethys sighs with relief. "Thank the goddess. Oh! When will this end? How long until this madness consumes her again?" You shake your head. "We'll figure something out. And until then, I'll keep calming her down when she needs it." |Tethys greets you as you step out of the tower's cell with a mix of concern and shame plain on her face. "Are you... is she... is..." She forces herself to pause and take a breath. "Is all well, Champion?" You nod. "She's okay." The relief from her is palpable. "Thank the goddess." Tethys leans against the door, loosing a long-held breath. "I'm so sorry for having put you through this, Champion. I can't imagine that was pleasant." [pc.isDK |"Actually it was," you say. "She's a handful in the best way." |You'd disagree, but that's doubtless inappropriate when you're talking to Kythie's mother. "It's alright. Happy to help." ] [pc.isDK |Tethys gives you a look... and then laughs. "I see. Well. I am glad we came to the right person." |"I'm glad. We thank you for your help, Champion. Truly." ] "So, what comes next?" Tethys rests a hand on the door dividing her from her daughter. "You've given Kythie some peace, and for that I cannot thank you enough already. But if you would aid us further, Champion, we would be forever in your debt if you discovered why this happened, or how to put an end to it. The crown will, of course, reward you handsomely if you find a more permanent cure for our daughter's suffering..." [pc.isDK |Royal money is nice and all, but if you drag this out, who knows how long you can keep slamming her daughter in secret. Still, you'd need to at least make a convincing act of investigating even if you don't necessarily intend to do so. ]"I'll need to look around the palace, the grounds, anywhere Kythie might have been." "Of course. I'll make sure our guards and servants know to help you in any way they can. You have no idea how relieved we are that you're here, Champion. Truly. If there's anything we can do to aid you in your inquiry, do not hesitate to ask. We would only request that you be discreet. If Prince Lazaran discovers the curse — or your method of controlling it — the future of our entire realm will be doubly imperilled. Please, Champion. Help us as you helped [var1 |Njorhaalt |Hawkethorne |Njorhaalt and Hawkethorne both ]!" Surely you can figure this whole curse thing out before that happens. ] ] '

泰西斯

rows.original: Speak with Tethys. You'll need to talk to her to get into the princess's cell.
rows.translation: 去和泰西斯谈谈。你必须和她交谈才能进入公主的牢房。
rows.raw: "Speak with Tethys. You'll need to talk to her to get into the princess's cell."

rows.original:
[pc.dcb
        |"Tethys," you say, inclining your head.
        |"Lady Tethys," you say, giving the royal matron a bow.
        |"Hiiii Tethys!" you cheer, bouncing over towards her with a reassuring smile.
    ]
    
    [pc.isBimbo
        |The curvy mander-mom's shoulders relax a little. 
    ]"Ah, Champion. [kythie.lnhLibido
        |My daughter's resting comfortably, thanks to you."
        |Kythie is getting restless again. But she's not slamming the doors and screaming, than the goddess."
        |I'm glad you're here. Kythie's-" she winces as the door next to her thumps on its bars, and the princess within howls. "Well, you can hear for yourself. Please, [pc.name]. I hope you can help her..."
    ]
rows.translation:
[pc.dcb
        |泰西斯，”你说道，同时微微倾下了头。
        |泰西斯女士，”你说道，同时向这位王室女眷鞠了一躬。
        |嗨呀，泰西斯！”你欢呼着，脸上带着安心的笑容，蹦蹦跳跳地向她走去。
    ]
    
    [pc.isBimbo
        |那位身材曲线优美的母亲微微放松了肩膀。 
    ]啊，冠军。 [kythie.lnhLibido
        |多亏了您，我女儿现在休息得非常舒适。
        |基西又开始坐立不安了。不过她并没有像那位女神那样摔门大喊大叫。
        |我很高兴你来了。Kythie在……”她的话还没说完，旁边的门突然被猛地关上了，门上的铁栅栏发出剧烈的撞击声，里面的公主也发出了凄厉的叫声。“嗯，你自己听听就知道了。拜托了…… [pc.name]我希望你能帮助她……
    ]

    [pc.dcb
        |"Tethys," you say, inclining your head.
        |"Lady Tethys," you say, giving the royal matron a bow.
        |"Hiiii Tethys!" you cheer, bouncing over towards her with a reassuring smile.
    ]
    
    [pc.isBimbo
        |The curvy mander-mom's shoulders relax a little. 
    ]"Ah, Champion. [kythie.lnhLibido

        |I'm glad you're here. Kythie's-" she winces as the door next to her thumps on its bars, and the princess within howls. "Well, you can hear for yourself. Please, [pc.name]. I hope you can help her..."

rows.translation: 前往凯西的世界吧。

rows.original: Ask to gain entrance to Kythie's cell.
rows.translation: 请求进入凯西的牢房。
rows.raw: "Ask to gain entrance to Kythie's cell."

rows.original: Cait's currently engaged in her god's work. Come back in a few hours.
rows.translation: Cait目前正在忙于她的重要工作，几小时后再回来吧。
rows.raw: "Cait's currently engaged in her god's work. Come back in a few hours."

rows.translation: 和Cait一起去参观吧。

rows.original: Cait is not around to help you.
rows.translation: 凯特现在不在身边，无法帮助你。
rows.raw: "Cait is not around to help you."

rows.translation: 说话吧。

rows.original: Swap words with the consort herself. Perhaps she has some insight into the situation that would be useful.
rows.translation: 与那位妻子本人交换一下话语吧。或许她对这种情况有一些有用的见解。
rows.raw: "Swap words with the consort herself. Perhaps she has some insight into the situation that would be useful."

rows.translation: 安慰她。

rows.original: Try and comfort the Lady Consort. She's putting up a brave face, but it's clear she's in deep emotional distress over all this.
rows.translation: 尽量安慰那位王妃吧。她虽然表面装作坚强，但很明显，这一切让她陷入了极度的情绪困扰之中。
rows.raw: "Try and comfort the Lady Consort. She's putting up a brave face, but it's clear she's in deep emotional distress over all this."

rows.translation: 离开

rows.original: "I'd like to go in," you say, nodding towards the cell door. "[kythie.lnhLibido |If she's calm, maybe we can talk." |I might be able to keep her from going over the edge again." |Somebody has to calm her down again." ] Tethys nods to one of the heavily armored guards standing by the stairs, who takes the key ring off the far wall and goes to unlock the door. [kythie.lnhLibido |Before he does, Tethys knocks on the door. "Kythie, love... someone's here to visit you. Are you... decent?" There's a soft chuckle from inside. "As much as I can be, mother. Send [pc.himHer] in." You and the Lady Consort exchange a look, and you step inside. |The moment he's lifted the bar, Tethys is already pushing you inside. |There's a flurry of activity on the other side before he even gets there: the princess throws her whole body against the door, howling with feral need. The door rattles as she pulls on the handle — you can imagine her feet braced on the doorframe, pulling with all her weight — but the bars hold firm, and she finally snarls and withdraws deeper into the cell. Tethys motions you closer, then gives the soldier a sharp gesture with his hand. The door's unlocked and unbarred, and you're pushed inside, all in the blink of an eye. ] The door closes behind you with a heavy thud, and the bar slides back into place.
rows.translation: 我想进去，”你说道，同时朝牢房门点了点头。[kythie.lnhLibido |如果她能保持冷静，或许我们可以谈谈。 |我或许能够阻止她再次陷入绝境。 |总得有人再让她冷静下来才行。 ] 泰西斯向站在楼梯旁的那名全副武装的守卫点了点头，那名守卫便从远处的墙上取下钥匙环，去开门了。 [kythie.lnhLibido |在他行动之前，泰西斯敲响了门。“凯西，亲爱的……有人来看你啦。你……收拾得还好吗？” 屋内传来一阵轻柔的笑声：“我已经尽力收拾得体了，妈妈。请让他们进来吧。 [pc.himHer] 你与那位妃子对视了一眼，然后走了进去。 |就在他举起杠铃的那一刻，泰西斯就已经将你拉了进去。 |在他还没到达那里之前，另一边就已经是一片忙碌的景象：公主用尽全力撞击大门，发出疯狂的呼喊声。她拉扯门把手时，门框发出嘎吱声——你可以想象她一定是用双脚抵住门框，用尽全力在拉门——但是铁栅栏依然坚不可摧，最终她只能发出愤怒的咆哮，然后退回到牢房里。 泰西斯将你拉近，然后用手向那个士兵做了个迅速的手势。门没有上锁，也没有插上门闩，转眼间你就被推进了里面。 ] 门在你身后沉重地关上了。 砰的一声然后，横杆会滑回原位。
rows.raw: ' "I'd like to go in," you say, nodding towards the cell door. "[kythie.lnhLibido |If she's calm, maybe we can talk." |I might be able to keep her from going over the edge again." |Somebody has to calm her down again." ] Tethys nods to one of the heavily armored guards standing by the stairs, who takes the key ring off the far wall and goes to unlock the door. [kythie.lnhLibido |Before he does, Tethys knocks on the door. "Kythie, love... someone's here to visit you. Are you... decent?" There's a soft chuckle from inside. "As much as I can be, mother. Send [pc.himHer] in." You and the Lady Consort exchange a look, and you step inside. |The moment he's lifted the bar, Tethys is already pushing you inside. |There's a flurry of activity on the other side before he even gets there: the princess throws her whole body against the door, howling with feral need. The door rattles as she pulls on the handle — you can imagine her feet braced on the doorframe, pulling with all her weight — but the bars hold firm, and she finally snarls and withdraws deeper into the cell. Tethys motions you closer, then gives the soldier a sharp gesture with his hand. The door's unlocked and unbarred, and you're pushed inside, all in the blink of an eye. ] The door closes behind you with a heavy thud, and the bar slides back into place. '

rows.translation: 下一个

rows.original:
[var0
        |This time, the princess isn't a sweaty mess of naked amazon — rather, she's dressed similarly to her father, with a short kilt and a tunic that leaves most of her chest bare. The effect on a large-breasted woman is... quite a bit more striking than on the willowy Prince Evander. A pair of thick cloth straps are trying to compete with the weight of her chest to hold it up, but is clearly struggling. The princess is quickly settling a fur mantle around her shoulders when you step inside, and her auroran tail has drooped behind her like a shamed puppy. 
        
        "Um, hi," she says awkwardly. Her cheeks and tail both burn a little brighter as you take her new appearance in, but she forces herself to look you in the eye. "I know we've, well, met, but... um, I don't think that quite counts as a proper introduction! Thank you, by the way. I don't, um... gods I'm making a fool of myself." 
        
        The princess takes a deep breath and straightens her back. "I'm Kythie. And I'm faring quite a lot better thanks to... whatever it was you call that."
        
        "[pc.isBimbo
            |Sex!" you explain. "Really raunchy, sweaty sex."
            
            Despite herself, the princess can't help but laugh, hearty and from the core. "Ah, yeah, I suppose it was!"
            
            You give her a bright smile. "Glad to meet the real you, Kythie. I'm [pc.name]. So you're okay now?"
            |Just trying to help," you say reassuringly. "I'm [pc.name]. Glad you're okay."
        ]
        
        "Better, not... okay." Kythie's toe-claws tap anxiously on the tower floor. "My insides are still burning, just not so hot as before. Thank the goddess!" She laughs awkwardly. "I don't... it's getting worse. I can feel it from my toes to my t— my tail-tip! Yeah!"
        
        "So you're not cured?"
        
        The princess fans herself with a hand. "I think you treated the symptom pretty well! Just, whatever is doing this to me is still... doing this to me."
        
        Then you should probably conduct an investigation while you have the chance...

rows.original: |[kythie.lnhLibido |"[pc.name]!" Kythie says, flashing you a warm grin as you step into her cell. She's dressed in her usual attire of kilt and bare-chested tunic, and her aurora is a calm, cool dancing light atop her tail. "Hey. Come on in. I'm glad to see a face that's not just mom and my guards!" The cell's not exactly the comfiest of accommodations, but there is at least a bed big enough for you both to sit on. Kythie's frilled ears wiggle a little when you drop down next to her, and her tail curls around your hips. "[rand |So what's going on outside? I feel like I'm going crazy cooped up in here! |Anything on your mind? If I can help figure out what's... what's wrong with me, I'd do anything. |Did you just come to hang out? I wouldn't mind, though I don't have much to do here. Mom gave me some books, but reading about the outdoors is not the same as going there! |I'm feeling a lot better thanks to you... but I can't help thinking that the fire's just going to come back any moment. This sucks! ]" |Kythie's already standing by the time you step inside. Her cheeks are a warm red, and her tail-flame's flickering behind her. "Hey, [pc.name]," she purrs, easily closing the distance with those long, muscular legs. "I've missed you!" There's a seductive edge to her voice, and when she comes in for a hug, the princess insistently presses her big chest against you, making sure you can feel how hard her nipples are beneath the fabric struggling to hold them up. "Come here." Kythie takes your hand and drags you towards the bed, swaying her hips against your crotch the entire time. "Let's talk. Or something!" The or something is incredibly subtle, huh? |Kythie's torn her clothes off again long before you make your entrance, and she greets you perched on the edge of her bed like a beast ready to pounce. Her thighs and scaly fingers are all glistening from who knows how long spent in furious masturbation — hours, judging by the smell. The second you're in the room, her tongue lolls from her mouth, and her draconic eyes narrow into dark, hungry slits. "Need... you..." she pants, grabbing one of her own tits and squeezing. "So... so fucking hot. I'm burning! I gotta... gotta, you... come... here!" Every muscle in her body tenses. She's not going to give you a choice in the matter here. ] ]

rows.original: Take your leave of Princess Kythie.

rows.original:
"How about you and I talk?" you say, leaning against the door. 
    
    [kythie.highLibido
        |

        "I... [pc.name], this isn't the time. My daughter... I can't."
        
        Kythie hammers the door again. Yeah, you get it, it's a little distracting even for you. You'll need to take care of that problem before you touch on interviewing her jailer. 
        |
        "Me?" Tethys says evenly. "If there is something I can do to help, Champion, you need only say."
    ]

rows.raw: "Ask Tethys to tell you a little about herself."

rows.raw: "Tethys wasn't born into royalty, so perhaps she can give you an outsider's perspective on the princely family."

rows.translation: 关于这个诅咒……

rows.translation: 泰西斯对于女儿的诅咒究竟有什么感受呢？
rows.raw: "What was Tethys's experience with her daughter's cursing?"

rows.translation: 纳雷瓦神庙

rows.raw: "Ask about the grand temple across from the palace. Have the priests and paladins there truly been no help? "
