Vasky — I mean, Magister Vasko — tried to get me to apprentice to him for a year anyway, but I didn't make it more than a couple of weeks before I had to tell him I couldn't hack it. And I don't give up easy!" "What made you give up?" Kythie shrugs. "I just... couldn't do it. As hard as I tried, it's like my fingers and tongue just won't work the way I tell them when I try and recite an incantation. And it's weird, I'm an athlete, I know how to push my body... except it all falls apart the moment I open a book." [var0 |Cait chuckles. "Some people have a real knack for magic. I'm told I'm one of them! And if some people can have a natural talent, I guess some people have a natural... un-talent." Kythie snorts. "Yeah, it's... something like that, feels like." |[pc.isMage |"Some people just aren't cut out for it," you say. "Spellcasting's hard, and dangerous, and if you try and push yourself to do it anyway you're likely to hurt yourself or others." "Thank you!" Kythie says, throwing a hand up. "I'm terrified of turning myself into a newt or something!" |"Alright," you say, "so you're no mage yourself. And you stopped practicing when?" "Ages back," Kythies says. "More than a year ago." ] ] You scratch your chin. Kythie definitely didn't do this to herself at least. '

rows.translation: 与魔法的互动

rows.original: "I, uh, well... that was... not my finest moment." Kythie squirms, eyes downcast. "One of the Order came to the tower when the curse really took me. I never even got her name, I was too far out of it by then, just about ready to bend the bars and climb out the window!" Kythie manages an awkward laugh. "I really made an ass of myself. The Astrida that came over was the first person I'd see except through a door in three days, and I threw myself at her. Like — well, you know. I'm pretty good at wrestling, but I had nothing on her; she had me pinned in a heartbeat! Heh, I bet it was at least awesome to watch — naked nineteen year old versus paladin in full war panoply!" You're sure it was. "So what did she do once she had you in submission?" "You don't have to phrase it like that!" Kythie laughs. "[var0 |That's more between me and Cait..." Cait gives you a wink. "But it wasn't like that," Kythie says. |That's more between you and me. It wasn't like that." ] "So what was it like?" Kythie wrings her hands. "It's hard to describe. She pinned my wrists and then squeezed, but I felt it inside my chest. Like the fist of Nareva herself was grabbing my lungs and trying to make me scream all the air out. It didn't hurt, not really, but it's like... I don't know! Like something in my soul was getting squeezed out." "Your soul?" "I don't know how else to say it. I've never felt my soul before, but I sure did then. It was wild, pressure like nothing else inside me... and then the fire was snuffed out! I felt great. And then promptly died of embarrassment." "[silly |RIP," you lament. |[pc.isCunning |Awfully talkative, for a ghost." Kythie snorts. "Well, I finally found somebody who'll listen! And I bet you want to know about the next time they came, huh?" You nod. |I guess you got better." Kythie snorts. "Yeah, I mean, had a paladin right there laying hands on me, bound to happen. Not for the last time, either." "What brought on the second visit?" ] ] The princess scratches her head. "I felt fine for a couple of days after the Astrida left. Felt myself again. Enough that I could apologize to the people I'd harassed, and the guardsman I roughed up. They were understanding, mostly. Dad had Mistress Hestia cooked up my favorite kreatopita and a cheesecake. I got to go outside and run around. It was good. And then on the third day, I woke up in a burning-hot sweat again, with my fingers already in myself. I managed to tell Mom it was starting again, at least! And then it was back to the tower, and another visit from an Astrida. This time it was Lady Eirina herself — the head of the Order here in Tychris!" [var0 |"That must be quite an honor, getting the personal attention of your goddess's representative," Cait says. "Do you know her well?" |"Do you know her?" ] "Eirina? Yeah, I mean, kinda. We've met before. I was there at her swearing in as the First Spear a couple years ago. She's not much older than me, so Dad wanted us to get friendly. We'll probably be working together a lot, when I'm princeps someday. I think we hit it off pretty well... which made it so much worse when my naked ass got beat down, again, by an Astrida, again, just one I have lunch with every few weeks." Kythie sighs. "The same thing happened again. I felt my soul squeeze, then the heat broke. Eirina examined me all over, waved some magic doohickies at me, mumbled a lot, and then told me I should be fine now!" "Obviously she was wrong..." [pc.bg acolyte scholar |You furrow your brow and consult what you know about the shadowy order. They're professional mage hunters and spell-breakers, trained from birth. If Kythie was actually cleared by the First Spear of the Astrida, whatever's going on here can't just be a regular garden variety curse. There's no way one of the most accomplished Astrida would just miss something; the curse almost certainly was broken. And then it just... came back. ] "Obviously," the princess groans. [pc.isCunning |"Did anything happen between the two attempts? Anything at all out of the ordinary?" Kythie shakes her head. "I don't... I don't know. We were celebrating. I partied, feasted, did a lot of exercise... I actually read a book! Oh, and visited the temple, like, every day. Lot of thankful prayers to Nareva. Right until her cure sorta wasn't." "So you didn't go anywhere?" Kythie shakes her head. "Didn't leave the walls. Just the palace grounds, courtyard, temple." Hmm. ]
rows.translation: 我，呃，那个……确实不是我表现最好的时刻。”凯西尴尬地低下了头。“就在诅咒开始真正影响我的时候，有个教团成员来到了塔里。我甚至都没记住她的名字，那时我已经完全失去了理智，几乎要强行折断铁栏杆从窗户逃走了！凯西勉强挤出了一个尴尬的笑声：“我真的搞砸了一切。那天来的阿斯特里达，是我三天来除了透过门看到的人之外，第一个见到的人，而我竟然直接扑了上去。嗯，你懂的……我的摔跤技术还算不错，但对她来说根本不是对手，她一下子就把我按在了地上！ 呵呵，光是看那场面肯定也很刺激吧——一个赤条条的十九岁少女，对上全副武装的骑士！” “你确定吗？那她把你制服之后，又做了什么？” “你不用说得这么直白吧！凯西笑了。[var0 |这其实是我和Cait之间的事情……” Cait向你眨了眨眼。 “但实际情况并不是这样的，”Kythie说道。 |这事儿就咱们俩知道吧，其实并不是那样的。 ] 那么，那是一种什么样的感觉呢？” 凯西绞着双手说道：“很难描述。她把我的手腕固定住，然后…… 被挤压了但我能感觉到那种感觉就在我的胸口。就好像娜雷瓦本人的拳头紧紧抓住了我的肺部，试图把我肺里的空气全部挤出来，让我发出尖叫。那种感觉确实存在。 受伤其实也不是，只是感觉……我也不知道该怎么形容！就好像我灵魂中的某种东西正在被挤压出来。” “你的灵魂？” “我想不出别的词来表达了。我从来没有…… 感觉到 之前我从未有过这样的感受，但那次确实经历了。那种感觉简直疯狂极了，我体内仿佛充满了前所未有的压力……然后，那种激情突然就被熄灭了！我当时感觉棒极了，可紧接着，却因为尴尬而‘死’掉了。[silly |安息吧，”你悲叹道。 |[pc.isCunning |对于一个鬼魂来说，真是太爱说话了。” 凯西哼了一声：“好吧，我终于找到了一个愿意听我说话的人！我打赌你肯定想知道他们下一次来的时候发生了什么，对吧？” 你点了点头。 |我想你这次做得更好了吧。” 凯西哼了一声：“是啊，毕竟有个圣骑士在我身上动来动去，这种事难免会发生。而且这已经不是第一次了。” “那第二次来访又是怎么回事呢？ ] ] 公主挠了挠头：“在阿斯特里达离开后，我有几天感觉挺好的……真的没什么不适。 我自己 再说一次，我确实应该向那些被我骚扰过的人，以及那个被我弄伤的卫兵道歉。他们大多都表示理解。爸爸还让赫斯提亚女士为我做了我最喜欢吃的菜。 克里托皮塔 还有一份芝士蛋糕。我得以到外面去跑跑，感觉真是太好了。到了第三天，我又在满身大汗中醒来，手指竟然又开始……那种不适感又出现了。至少我还能告诉妈妈，症状又复发了！然后我又回到了那座塔里，阿斯特里达又一次来找我。这次来的是艾琳娜女士本人——她就是提克里斯地区这个组织的负责人啊！ [var0 |能够得到你的女神代表的亲自关注，想必是件非常荣幸的事情吧，”凯特说道，“你和她关系不错吗？ |你认识她吗？ ] 艾琳娜？嗯，算是吧。我们之前确实见过面。几年前她宣誓成为‘第一长矛’的时候，我在场。她比我年纪大不了多少，所以爸爸希望我们能建立良好的关系。等我有朝一日成为王子，我们很可能需要经常一起合作。我觉得我们相处得还挺不错的……这也让事情变得…… 糟糕多了 我又被一个叫阿斯特里达的女孩子揍了一顿，还是那个每隔几周就会和我一起吃午饭的女孩。” 凯西叹了口气：“又发生了同样的事情。我感觉到自己的灵魂仿佛被挤压了一下，然后突然感到一阵剧痛。艾琳娜仔细检查了我的身体，用了一些魔法治疗我，嘟囔了好一会儿，最后告诉我现在应该没事了！” “显然，她错了…… [pc.bg acolyte scholar |你皱起眉头，努力回忆自己所了解的关于这个神秘组织的信息。他们是一群专业的法师猎手和法术破解者，从出生起就接受了专门的训练。 如果凯西真的被阿斯特拉达的第一长矛解除了诅咒，那么这里发生的这一切绝对不可能是普通的诅咒现象。 像阿斯特丽达这样能力出众的人，绝对不可能遗漏任何细节；这个诅咒，几乎可以肯定…… 是 坏了。然后它又……恢复了正常状态。 ] 显然，”公主叹道。 [pc.isCunning |在这两次尝试之间发生了什么吗？有没有什么不寻常的事情？” 凯西摇了摇头。“我不知道……我真的不知道。我们当时在庆祝，我参加了派对，吃了很多美食，还做了很多运动……实际上…… 读书哦，而且每天都会去那座寺庙。会向纳雷瓦献上许多感恩的祷告。直到她最终被治愈之前，一直都是这样。” “所以你根本没去过别的地方吗？” 凯西摇了摇头：“没有离开过宫殿的范围。只是在宫殿的院子里、寺庙里活动而已。” 嗯…… ]
rows.raw: ' "I, uh, well... that was... not my finest moment." Kythie squirms, eyes downcast. "One of the Order came to the tower when the curse really took me. I never even got her name, I was too far out of it by then, just about ready to bend the bars and climb out the window!" Kythie manages an awkward laugh. "I really made an ass of myself. The Astrida that came over was the first person I'd see except through a door in three days, and I threw myself at her. Like — well, you know. I'm pretty good at wrestling, but I had nothing on her; she had me pinned in a heartbeat! Heh, I bet it was at least awesome to watch — naked nineteen year old versus paladin in full war panoply!" You're sure it was. "So what did she do once she had you in submission?" "You don't have to phrase it like that!" Kythie laughs. "[var0 |That's more between me and Cait..." Cait gives you a wink. "But it wasn't like that," Kythie says. |That's more between you and me. It wasn't like that." ] "So what was it like?" Kythie wrings her hands. "It's hard to describe. She pinned my wrists and then squeezed, but I felt it inside my chest. Like the fist of Nareva herself was grabbing my lungs and trying to make me scream all the air out. It didn't hurt, not really, but it's like... I don't know! Like something in my soul was getting squeezed out." "Your soul?" "I don't know how else to say it. I've never felt my soul before, but I sure did then. It was wild, pressure like nothing else inside me... and then the fire was snuffed out! I felt great. And then promptly died of embarrassment." "[silly |RIP," you lament. |[pc.isCunning |Awfully talkative, for a ghost." Kythie snorts. "Well, I finally found somebody who'll listen! And I bet you want to know about the next time they came, huh?" You nod. |I guess you got better." Kythie snorts. "Yeah, I mean, had a paladin right there laying hands on me, bound to happen. Not for the last time, either." "What brought on the second visit?" ] ] The princess scratches her head. "I felt fine for a couple of days after the Astrida left. Felt myself again. Enough that I could apologize to the people I'd harassed, and the guardsman I roughed up. They were understanding, mostly. Dad had Mistress Hestia cooked up my favorite kreatopita and a cheesecake. I got to go outside and run around. It was good. And then on the third day, I woke up in a burning-hot sweat again, with my fingers already in myself. I managed to tell Mom it was starting again, at least! And then it was back to the tower, and another visit from an Astrida. This time it was Lady Eirina herself — the head of the Order here in Tychris!" [var0 |"That must be quite an honor, getting the personal attention of your goddess's representative," Cait says. "Do you know her well?" |"Do you know her?" ] "Eirina? Yeah, I mean, kinda. We've met before. I was there at her swearing in as the First Spear a couple years ago. She's not much older than me, so Dad wanted us to get friendly. We'll probably be working together a lot, when I'm princeps someday. I think we hit it off pretty well... which made it so much worse when my naked ass got beat down, again, by an Astrida, again, just one I have lunch with every few weeks." Kythie sighs. "The same thing happened again. I felt my soul squeeze, then the heat broke. Eirina examined me all over, waved some magic doohickies at me, mumbled a lot, and then told me I should be fine now!" "Obviously she was wrong..." [pc.bg acolyte scholar |You furrow your brow and consult what you know about the shadowy order. They're professional mage hunters and spell-breakers, trained from birth. If Kythie was actually cleared by the First Spear of the Astrida, whatever's going on here can't just be a regular garden variety curse. There's no way one of the most accomplished Astrida would just miss something; the curse almost certainly was broken. And then it just... came back. ] "Obviously," the princess groans. [pc.isCunning |"Did anything happen between the two attempts? Anything at all out of the ordinary?" Kythie shakes her head. "I don't... I don't know. We were celebrating. I partied, feasted, did a lot of exercise... I actually read a book! Oh, and visited the temple, like, every day. Lot of thankful prayers to Nareva. Right until her cure sorta wasn't." "So you didn't go anywhere?" Kythie shakes her head. "Didn't leave the walls. Just the palace grounds, courtyard, temple." Hmm. ] '

rows.translation: 尝试完成阿斯特丽达的任务吧。

rows.original: "My family? You're not thinking one of them-" You wave your hands. "No, no. I'm just [pc.isCunning |looking for context here |trying to learn about you all ]. You're an only child, right, Kythie?" She nods, though hardly enthusiastically. "Yeah. First and only. Don't worry — no siblings trying to make sure I can't take the throne." "What about your parents, do they have any nieces and nephews that might have designs?" "On my dad's side, yeah. Mom's parents were, uh, a couple of the moment, I guess you might say. She's an only child too." You arch a brow. "A couple of the moment?" Kythie chuckles awkwardly. "Yeah, well, my grandfather's a baron, he rules one of the villages up north on the border, but he never married. He [var0 |met a girl like Cait here, a mendicant priestess of Mallach, and contracted with her to bear him a child." "Just like my dad did to have me and Calla," Cait says. "Though it's pretty rare for a missionary to take something like that on by herself. She must have really loved him." "That's what I hear," Kythie shrugs. "But she left before I was born. Either way, it didn't win Grandpa any favors at court. I don't know about Jassira, but in Tychris, parents are expected to get married. Stay together. People give him weird looks even now." |eventually entered into a compact with a Mallachite missionary that came to preach in the principality, and she bore him a child." "Does something like that happen often?" "No!" Kythie laughs. "No, it really doesn't. Parents are supposed to stay together, aren't they? Get married and all. But my grandmother left to go back to Jassira before I was even born. People remember that about Grandpa more than anything." ] You glance over your shoulder at the door and whisper. "Does that mean your mother's a bastard, by the court's reckoning?" That makes Kythie squirm. "No. She's, I mean, it's a religious thing. A foreign religious thing, but still, the laws says children born by contract are legitimate just as much as the church does. So, no. It's just... yes, the way people sometimes treat her, you'd think they didn't believe in any of that. A lot of the court doesn't like that my parents are together. Even now." [pc.bg nobleScion |Someone the court considers lowborn being elevated to royal consort must have made Tethys some enemies, even if Kythie and her parents don't recognize it. Noble circles are hidebound at the best of times, and Tychris seems more conservative than most. Could that be a motive for the cursing? Hard to say. ] "So," you say, "how did your mother end up marrying Prince Evander then?" "It was, is, kind of a long story," Kythie shrugs. "But basically, Grandpa — on Dad's side — decided it was a good idea to have some foreign blood in his grandchildren. That we'd been isolated up here so long that we needed it. And Mom's the only noble in the whole city who doesn't have two parents born in the city. It was her or nobody." The princess's ears flick. "But it was a good match! They'd been friends growing up, and they love each other. I'm glad they're my folks." "But you said you have some cousins?" She nods. "Yeah. Dad had a brother, and he had a couple of kids..." [pc.isDK |"What killed him?" |"Sorry for your loss. What happend?" ] "He took sick. We had a real bad winter, maybe ten years ago now? Got a deep cough he never could shake. It was the same year Grandpa passed, too. That was... it was rough. Uncle Iavose's daughters are tough as nails, though. They make me look soft and dainty. And before you ask — they love me, they've protected me all my life. I'd sooner believe Nareva herself cursed me than either of them."
rows.translation: 我的家人？你该不会是说他们中的某个人吧……” 你挥了挥手，说道：“不，不是的。我只是…… [pc.isCunning |需要结合上下文来理解这句话的含义。 |正在努力了解你们所有人。 ]你是独生子女吧，Kythie？” 她点了点头，但并不显得很热情。“是的，我是独生女。别担心，没有兄弟姐妹会试图阻止我继承王位。” “那你的父母呢？他们有没有侄子侄女可能会对王位产生兴趣？我爸爸这一边，嗯，是的。我妈妈的父母，呃，可以说他们属于那种‘一时风光’的人吧。我妈妈也是独生女。” 你挑了挑眉毛：“一时风光的人？” 凯西尴尬地笑了笑。 嗯，我祖父是个男爵，他在北方边境的一个村庄里掌管着那里的事务，但他从未结婚。 [var0 |在这里，我遇到了一个像凯特这样的女孩——她是玛拉赫教派的一位修行女祭司，我和她约定，让她为我生一个孩子。” “就像我爸爸为了生下我和卡拉那样，”凯特说道，“不过，对于一位传教士来说，独自承担这样的责任其实是非常罕见的。 她一定真的很爱他。” “我也是这么听说的，”凯西耸了耸肩，“不过她在我出生之前就离开了。不管怎样，这件事并没有让爷爷在宫廷里获得任何好处。至于贾西拉，我就不清楚了，但在提克里斯，人们普遍认为父母应该结婚。 待在一起吧。现在人们看到他还是会用奇怪的眼神看着他。 |最终，她与一位来到这个公国传教的玛拉基特传教士缔结了婚约，还为他生下了一个孩子。” “这种事情经常发生吗？” “不会的！”凯西笑着说，“真的不会。父母应该是永远在一起的，不是吗？应该结婚生子才对。但在我出生之前，我的祖母就已经回到了贾西拉。人们对祖父的这件事记得最为清楚。 ] 你回头瞥了一眼门，低声说道：“按照法庭的判断，这是不是意味着你的母亲是个私生女？ 那个 这让凯西感到很不自在。“不行。我的意思是，这其实是一件与宗教有关的事情。 外国的 这虽然有点宗教色彩，但法律明确规定，通过契约诞生的孩子与通过正常婚姻诞生的孩子具有同等的法律地位，教会也认同这一观点。所以，答案是否定的。不过……有些人对待她的态度，确实让人觉得他们根本不相信这些道理。至今，很多法院也不认可我父母这种同居关系。 [pc.bg nobleScion |对于那些被法庭认为出身低微的人而言，能够成为王室的配偶，无疑会招致许多敌人的怨恨。即使凯西和她的父母没有意识到这一点。贵族阶层在最好的情况下也依然非常保守，而蒂克里斯似乎比大多数人都更加守旧。这会不会是那些诅咒行为的动机呢？很难说。 ] 那么，”你问道，“你母亲后来是怎么嫁给埃万德王子的呢？” “这其实是个挺长的故事，”凯西耸了耸肩，“但基本上就是，我爸爸那边的祖父觉得，让孙子们身上有一些外国血统会是个不错的主意。 我们在这里与世隔绝了太久，真的非常需要这样的帮助。而且妈妈是整个城市里唯一一位父母并非都出生在这个城市的贵族。除了她，没有人能够胜任这个角色。”公主的耳朵微微动了动。“不过，这确实是一段很合适的婚配啊！ 他们从小就是朋友，而且彼此非常相爱。我很高兴他们成为了我的家人。 “但是你说你还有一些表亲吧？” 她点了点头。“是的。我爸爸有一个哥哥，而那个哥哥也有几个孩子…… [pc.isDK |是什么导致了他的死亡？ |对您的损失我深表遗憾。到底发生了什么？ ] 他生病了。那是大约十年前吧，那个冬天实在非常寒冷。他一直咳嗽个不停，怎么也治不好。就在那一年，爷爷也去世了。那真是……一段艰难的时光。不过，Iavose叔叔的女儿们都非常坚强，她们让我觉得自己显得太脆弱、太娇弱了。在你问之前，我想说——她们真的很爱我。 受保护的 我一生都这么认为。比起他们中的任何一个，我更愿意相信是纳雷瓦本人诅咒了我。

"What about your parents, do they have any nieces and nephews that might have designs?" "On my dad's side, yeah. Mom's parents were, uh, a couple of the moment, I guess you might say. She's an only child too." You arch a brow. "A couple of the moment?" Kythie chuckles awkwardly. And before you ask — they love me, they've protected me all my life. I'd sooner believe Nareva herself cursed me than either of them." '

rows.translation: 她的家人

rows.original: "Well, there's a lot of people that live and work here," Kythie says. "Between servants, staff, men-at-arms, we probably have a hundred people on the grounds! I know a lot of them by name, but not everybody..." "Who has influence here, then? Other than you and your parents." Kythie clasps her hands and thinks. "I guess there's probably... three people with real influence, like that? Magister Vasko, of course. He's my parents' most important counselor. Then there's Mistress Hestia. She's sort of the head domestic, handles most of the cooking — for us and for the palace as a whole. Amazing baker. And then there's Captain Tyna, head of the guard. She reports to Mom, the city's Strategos, and makes sure the palace, and the city as a whole, stay safe." "Do you get along with all of them?" "Yeah!" Kythie insists. "Hestia dotes on me like an extra mom. Tyna and I spar all the time — and she doesn't have anything to be jealous of, she kicks my butt more often than not. And Vasko's always trying to teach me things, even if I think, deep down, he knows I'm too dense to really get his lessons about magic and whatever." [pc.isMage |"What kind of things does he try to teach you?" "I don't know... protection magic, I guess? He said it was important that I learn how to sense other mages casting their spells, and how to counter it. Maybe it would have helped keep me from getting cursed? He's a smart man, especially for someone from the commons. He must have been worried something like this could happen. I really should have tried harder to understand." You have to wonder, why would Vasko be so interested in teaching Kythie to combat mages? She's neither warrior nor mage. ] [var0 |Cait nibbles the tip of her thumb. "So Hestia handles most of your food, right? What's her story?" "She and my mom go way back, actually," Kythie says. "Mom's was the city's Strategos — our top general — even before she married dad. Hestia was one of her companions. When my mom hung up her spear after the Lion Witch's War, Hestia did too, and Mom invited her to come serve in the palace. I think she'd intended for Hestia to be a guard-captain or something, but she said she was done with fighting, and wanted to do something wholesome with the rest of her life. Turned out she's an amazing cook." You and Cait exchange a glance. Hestia certainly has opportunity to hurt the princess, but the motive seems lacking. ]
rows.translation: 嗯，这里居住和工作的人很多，”凯西说，“包括仆人、工作人员和卫兵，整个庄园里大概有上百人吧！我认识他们中的很多人，但也不是所有人……” “那么，这里谁才有真正的影响力呢？ 除了你和你的父母之外。” 凯西双手交叠，陷入沉思。“我想，大概还有……三个人真正拥有这样的影响力吧？当然是瓦斯科大师。他是我父母最信任的顾问。 还有赫斯提亚女士。她差不多算是家里的管家，负责为我们以及整个宫殿准备大部分食物。她是个非常出色的烘焙师。另外还有泰娜队长，她是卫队的负责人。她直接向城市的战略长官——也就是妈妈汇报工作，并确保宫殿以及整个城市的安全。你和他们所有人都能相处得很好吗？” “当然！”凯西坚定地回答，“赫斯提亚把我当亲生女儿一样疼爱。我和泰娜经常一起练习战斗，她根本没有什么可嫉妒的——事实上，她大多数时候都能把我打得落花流水。 而瓦斯科总是试图教我各种东西，尽管在内心深处，我觉得他应该知道我实在太笨了，根本学不会。 获得 他关于魔法以及各种相关知识的讲解。 [pc.isMage |他试图教你哪些东西呢？” “我也不清楚……应该是防护魔法吧？他说，学会感知其他法师施放的法术并学会如何应对它们非常重要。也许这样就能避免我被诅咒吧？他是个聪明人，尤其是对于一个出身于平民家庭的人来说。他肯定预料到会发生这种事。我真应该更加努力地去理解这些内容。” 人们不禁会想…… 瓦斯科为什么会对教导凯西如何对抗法师如此感兴趣呢？她既不是战士，也不是法师。 ] [var0 |凯特轻轻咬着拇指的指尖。“所以，大部分食物都是赫斯提亚负责准备的，对吧？她的背景是怎样的呢？” “其实，她和我的妈妈关系很久了，”凯西说道，“在我妈妈嫁给爸爸之前，她就已经是这座城市的战略顾问了——也就是我们的最高指挥官。 赫斯提亚也是她的同伴之一。在狮女巫之战结束后，当我妈妈放下她的长矛时，赫斯提亚也跟着停下了战斗，于是妈妈邀请她来宫殿里工作。我想妈妈原本打算让赫斯提亚担任卫队队长之类的职务，但赫斯提亚表示她已经厌倦了战斗，想要用余生去做一些有意义的事情。 原来她是个非常出色的厨师啊。” 你和凯特对视了一眼。 赫斯提亚确实有机会伤害那位公主，但她的动机似乎不够充分。 ]
rows.raw: ' "Well, there's a lot of people that live and work here," Kythie says. "Between servants, staff, men-at-arms, we probably have a hundred people on the grounds! I know a lot of them by name, but not everybody..." "Who has influence here, then? Other than you and your parents." Kythie clasps her hands and thinks. "I guess there's probably... three people with real influence, like that? Magister Vasko, of course. He's my parents' most important counselor. Then there's Mistress Hestia. She's sort of the head domestic, handles most of the cooking — for us and for the palace as a whole. Amazing baker. And then there's Captain Tyna, head of the guard. She reports to Mom, the city's Strategos, and makes sure the palace, and the city as a whole, stay safe." "Do you get along with all of them?" "Yeah!" Kythie insists. "Hestia dotes on me like an extra mom. Tyna and I spar all the time — and she doesn't have anything to be jealous of, she kicks my butt more often than not. And Vasko's always trying to teach me things, even if I think, deep down, he knows I'm too dense to really get his lessons about magic and whatever." [pc.isMage |"What kind of things does he try to teach you?" "I don't know... protection magic, I guess? He said it was important that I learn how to sense other mages casting their spells, and how to counter it. Maybe it would have helped keep me from getting cursed? He's a smart man, especially for someone from the commons. He must have been worried something like this could happen. I really should have tried harder to understand." You have to wonder, why would Vasko be so interested in teaching Kythie to combat mages? She's neither warrior nor mage. ] [var0 |Cait nibbles the tip of her thumb. "So Hestia handles most of your food, right? What's her story?" "She and my mom go way back, actually," Kythie says. "Mom's was the city's Strategos — our top general — even before she married dad. Hestia was one of her companions. When my mom hung up her spear after the Lion Witch's War, Hestia did too, and Mom invited her to come serve in the palace. I think she'd intended for Hestia to be a guard-captain or something, but she said she was done with fighting, and wanted to do something wholesome with the rest of her life. Turned out she's an amazing cook." You and Cait exchange a glance. Hestia certainly has opportunity to hurt the princess, but the motive seems lacking. ] '

rows.translation: 宫廷侍从

rows.original: "You mean, what do I do aside from being a pretty princess, right?" Kythie says with a smirk, adjusting her little gold tiara. "As of this year I'm an aurum wreathe athlete, that's what!" Kythie flexes, slapping a bicep that strains the gold armlet she's wearing. "I'm a champion discus thrower, and I'm pretty darn good at the thousand-yard sprint, the javelin, and wrestling." [var0 |"I'll say!" Cait laughs. She rubs at one of the mostly-healed bite marks on her arm. "You're a feisty one for sure." Kythie blushes. |"You're a real powerhouse, huh?" Kythie's tail swishes proudly. "Yep!" ] "Your parents don't exactly look like the sporting types," you muse, thoughts wandering between the plush goddess of a consort and her frail-looking twink of a husband. "How'd you end up so interested in it?" The princess snort-laughs and wiggles her ears. "Yeah, uh, I don't think Dad would survive a round in the ring with me, let alone Captain Tyna. But Mom used to be a warrior — a damned good one too! She hung up her spear to focus on raising me, though. But she made sure I grew up strong enough to protect myself at least." "Does that mean you know how to actually fight?" [pc.bg soldier |Any highborn would be expected to know how, of course, but there's a hell of a difference between training in the palace and actual experience. You've seen her peers learn that the hard way. ] "Wrestling is fighting! Just for submission rather than, like, killing somebody," Kythie insists. "But I'm a noble. I learned how to use a sword and spear, and fight in the shield wall and from horseback. I wouldn't say I have any particular talent for combat, but I'm not bad at it. I could lead the city's soldiers if I had to. It's just... part of that training was also learning how to fight bare-handed, and I kind of fell in love with that instead of poking holes in people. Captain Tyna taught me to love the thrill of it, and then that got me interested in the other sports at the Tycathalon, and I just... I don't know, I guess I've just got a talent for the discus." "When did you start competing?" Kythie thinks for a moment. "Um, I guess when I was about twelve, I started really training to compete. There are tournaments for children that I did well in, but you need to be sixteen to compete in the real ones. Mom took me to Drapsa and Khor'minos to compete there last year and the year before. And this year was the big Tycathalon." So three years. "Any major wins before this year?" "I took argent in Khor'minos! Though I didn't feel great about that..." You quirk a brow. "Why so?" The princess shifts uncomfortably. "Well, most events separate men from women as it is, you know, but Khor'minos is a little more sexist than Tychris. There were barely any women competing, and most of the lady-minotaurs didn't take it very seriously. The only reason I didn't take aurum there was that there was one more foreign competitor, a sellsword from Tronarii, where they use these bladed discs in battle. She was incredible, like she was dancing as she threw." [pc.bg soldier |Experience wins again. |"Damn." ] [var0 |Cait gasps. "Oh, I think I know who you mean! Tall, skinny human lady that looks like she was carved out of mahogany?" Kythie nods. "Yeah! I forget her name, but she's a big champion back south. She did a demonstration at the temple once. My sister was crushing on her for weeks..." ] Either way, it doesn't sound like Kythie's had enough of an athletics career to be worth sabotaging.
rows.translation: 你是说，除了当一个漂亮的公主之外，我还能做些什么，对吧？”凯西带着一丝笑意说道，同时调整着自己戴在头上的小金冠。“从今年开始，我已经成为了一名‘黄金花环’运动会的运动员，就是这个啦！” 凯西展示着自己的肌肉，用力甩动手臂，使得她戴在手臂上的金手镯发出了叮当声。“我可是掷铁饼项目的冠军，而且在一千码短跑、标枪项目和摔跤方面也表现得相当不错哦。 [var0 |真的吗！”凯特笑着说，她轻轻揉了揉手臂上那些已经基本愈合的咬痕。“你确实是个脾气火爆的人呢。” 凯西的脸颊顿时红了。 |你可真是个厉害的角色啊，嗯？” 凯西骄傲地摇动着尾巴：“没错！ ] 你的父母看起来可不太像运动型的人啊，”你想着，脑海中不断浮现出那位雍容华贵的王后与她那位看起来体弱多病的丈夫的形象。“你是怎么对运动产生兴趣的呢？” 公主发出一阵轻笑，还摇动着耳朵。 是啊，我觉得爸爸要是和我一起上擂台，肯定撑不过一回合，更别提泰娜队长了。不过妈妈以前可是个战士，而且还是个非常出色的战士！不过后来她放弃了战斗，专心抚养我。不过她确实确保我长大后有足够的力气保护自己。这是不是意味着你真的知道该怎么做？ 战斗?" [pc.bg soldier |任何一个出身高贵的人都应该懂得这些，但在宫中接受训练与实际经验之间，还是存在着天壤之别的。你也亲眼看到过她的同龄人是如何通过惨痛的教训才学会这些的。 ] 摔跤其实就是战斗！只不过目的是让对手屈服，而不是杀死对方，”凯西坚持说道。“但我可是贵族出身。我学会了如何使用剑和长矛，也懂得如何在盾墙后作战，以及如何骑马作战。虽然我不能说自己在战斗方面有什么特别的天赋，但至少…… 糟糕 如果需要的话，我完全可以带领这座城市的士兵们作战。只是……那些训练内容中也包括学习徒手格斗，而我反而对这种战斗方式产生了浓厚的兴趣，而不是喜欢用武器刺伤别人。泰娜上尉教会了我享受那种战斗带来的刺激感，从那以后，我对泰卡塔隆竞技场里的其他运动项目也产生了兴趣。总之……我也说不清楚，大概我就是天生适合投掷铁饼吧。 你是从什么时候开始参加比赛的呢？” 凯西思考了一会儿，说道：“嗯，大概在我十二岁的时候，我开始认真训练，准备参加比赛。有一些针对儿童的比赛，我在那些比赛中表现得还不错，但要想参加真正的比赛，至少得十六岁才行。去年和前年，妈妈带着我去德拉普萨和霍尔米诺斯参加比赛。而今年，就是那场重要的泰卡塔隆比赛。 所以，三年了。 “在今年之前，有什么重大的胜利吗？” “我在科尔米诺斯比赛中获得了银牌！不过当时我并没有为此感到高兴……” 你挑了挑眉毛：“为什么呢？” 公主显得有些不自在地挪了挪身子。 嗯，大多数活动本来就会将男性和女性区分开来，但你知道，科尔米诺斯这个活动比提克里斯更加性别歧视。几乎没有任何女性参加比赛，而且大多数女弥诺陶洛斯们也并不把这次比赛当回事。我之所以没有去参加那里的比赛，只是因为还有另一位外国参赛者——他是一名来自特罗纳里的雇佣兵，在那里人们会在战斗中使用这种带刃的圆盘武器。 她简直太厉害了，投球的时候简直就像在跳舞一样。 [pc.bg soldier |经验依然是最重要的。 |该死。 ] [var0 |凯特倒吸一口凉气：“哦，我想我知道你指的是谁了！那个高个子、身材苗条的女性，看起来就像是用红木雕刻出来的一样吧？” 凯西点了点头。 “对！我忘了她的名字，但她是在南方很有名的一位强者。她曾经在寺庙里进行过表演，我妹妹当时迷上了她，整整好几周都对她念念不忘呢…… ] 无论如何， 听起来，Kythie的田径生涯还没有发展到值得被破坏的程度啊。

rows.translation: 她的职业生涯

rows.original: "I guess you would have heard about that, huh?" Kythie says, fiddling with a braid. "Yeah, I have a fiancee. He's a prince from the city of Felurze, a little south of here. Our parents made the arrangement years ago. He'll be of age next year, and then come up to Tychris so we can be wed. I just hope to the gods he never finds out about any of this..." "You think he would be upset about what [var0 |you and Cait have |we've ] been doing?" She shakes her head. "I don't know, but I'm sure he'd never let me live it down. He's a little shit like that, always teasing me about something! If it's not about how I act, it's about some little this-and-that from ten years ago... and if he runs out of ammunition he'll just say I have fat tits." Kythie pouts, crossing her arms under her fat tits. "Sounds like you're good friends, at least?" "Eh, I mean, I guess. I only see him once or twice a year, but we get on. At least, we put in the effort to. Our parents are all really invested in seeing this marriage play out." "Why is that?" And more importantly, you wonder, who would benefit from destabilizing it. Kythie sighs. "That's, well it's, um, complicated. You've seen my dad. A stiff breeze would blow him over. Grandpa, Uncle, my great-aunt, it's all kind of the same. I'm the first member of the family born anything but sickly in living memory. The clerics of Nareva said we need to stop marrying nobles from our own court; that foreign blood will save us from the decline. Mom kinda proved that it's moving in the right direction, at least." [pc.bg scholar |It sounds like the point is to undo a little too much inbreeding up here in Tychris. Old Belhar used to have the same problem, as you recall; several emperors who came from the union of cousins proved to be unstable. Better to be physically frail than mentally, you suppose. |You wonder if the royal was already under some kind of curse... ] "So, do you really think he cares about your, well, maidenhead?" you ask. "It's certainly important to your parents." Kythie glances away. "I don't think he does, but his parents do. The feeling's mutual, I guess. Dad's not the only one concerned with bloodlines; my fiancee's parents only agreed to the arrangement on the assurance that their son would plant his seed in my womb, ensuring their blood became the next rulers of Tychris. And the best way to assure that is my chastity. The contract's ironclad, oathsworn before Nareva and Tira." "And what does your prince think about all of this?" "I, uh," Kythie's ears flatten against her head. "I don't know. It's our duty. He knows that as well as I do. He's a twerp, but still puts in the effort to be tolerable." [pc.bg minstrel noblescion courtesan |You've heard this story before. It's a rare thing for promised couples to be enthusiastically in love; the best they can hope for is a quiet toleration that blooms into better. But Kythie's response leaves you wondering. "You're an incredible woman, Kythie. He should be over the moon." "Yeah! But, like, I mean, he's just..." Kythie's cheeks flush, and she squeezes her own fingers. "He's always... he's never been interested in me like that. Not like Mom and Dad were when they were in our shoes. It's, I guess it's just kind of disappointing. I don't get the childhood friend romance, or the prince charming with love at first sight. And he just gets... me." Could it be that the Prince of Felurze would want to break off this engagement himself? ]
rows.translation: 我想你…… 会 我听说过这件事，对吧？”凯西一边说着，一边摆弄着自己的发辫。“是的，我有一个未婚夫。他是来自费卢尔泽城的王子，就在我们这里南边不远处。我们的父母几年前就安排好了这门婚事。他明年就成年了，到时候就会来到蒂克里斯，然后我们就可以结婚了。我只希望诸神能让他永远不要知道这些事情……” “你认为他会因为这些事情而难过吗？ [var0 |你和Cait有 |我们已经 ] 他最近在干什么呢？” 她摇了摇头：“我不知道，但我敢肯定，他绝对不会让我就此罢休的。他就是这种人，总是拿一些事情来取笑我！要不是我的行为方式，就是十年前的一些小事……要是他的‘弹药’用完了，他就只会说‘我的胸部很大’吧。”凯西撅着嘴，双臂交叉在胸前。 “听起来你们应该是很好的朋友吧？” “嗯，算是吧。我一年也就见他一两次面，不过我们相处得还不错。 至少，我们付出了努力。我们的父母也都非常希望看到这段婚姻能够顺利发展。” “为什么呢？”更重要的是，你会想知道，谁会从破坏这段婚姻中获益。 凯西叹了口气。 嗯，这个情况有点复杂。你们都见过我爸爸，一阵微风就能把他吹倒。爷爷、叔叔、我的姑婆们，也都是这种情况。在大家的记忆中，我是家里第一个没有天生体弱多病的成员。 纳雷瓦的神职人员们认为，我们应该停止与自己宫廷中的贵族通婚；他们认为，外来的血统能够帮助我们避免衰落。不过，妈妈的做法至少证明，我们正在朝着正确的方向前进。 [pc.bg scholar |看来，关键在于扭转提克里斯地区这种过度近亲繁殖的现象。 正如你所记得的，老贝尔哈尔也曾面临同样的问题——几位由表亲联姻而产生的皇帝都被证明是不稳定的。或许，身体虚弱总比精神失常要好吧。 |你不禁怀疑，这位王室成员是否早已陷入了某种诅咒之中…… ] 那么，你真的认为他在意你的……贞操吗？”你问道，“不过这对你的父母来说肯定很重要。” 凯西移开了视线，说道：“我不这么认为。 他 他也是这么想的，但他的父母却坚持这样做。我想，这种想法是相互的。父亲并不是唯一一个关心血统问题的人；我未婚妻的父母也是只有在得到保证——他们的儿子会将自己的后代留在我的肚子里，从而确保他们的血脉能够成为泰克里斯未来的统治者——之后，才同意这个安排的。 而确保这一点的最佳方式，就是保持我的贞洁。这份契约是铁一般的，我在纳雷瓦和蒂拉面前宣誓过。” “那么，你的王子对这一切是怎么看的呢？” “我，呃……”凯西的耳朵紧紧贴在脑袋上。 我不知道。这是我们的职责。他和我一样明白这一点。他虽然是个小混蛋，但还是会努力让自己变得可以忍受。 [pc.bg minstrel noblescion courtesan |你以前肯定听过这个故事。对于那些被许下承诺的情侣来说，真正彼此深爱着对方其实是件难得的事；他们最多只能期待一种逐渐发展成更深厚感情的、表面上的宽容与接纳。但凯西的反应却让人不禁产生疑问：“凯西，你真是个了不起的女性。 他应该高兴极了。” “是啊！但是，我是说，他其实……”凯西的脸颊涨得通红，她紧紧地捏着自己的手指，“他从来都没有这样对我……从来都没有像爸爸妈妈在我们这个年纪时那样对我。 我觉得，这真的有点令人失望。我无法理解那种青梅竹马的恋情，也无法理解那种一见钟情的浪漫故事。而他，只是选择了……我。 难道费卢尔泽王子本人想要解除这段婚约吗？ ]
rows.raw: " "I guess you would have heard about that, huh?" Kythie says, fiddling with a braid. "Yeah, I have a fiancee. He's a prince from the city of Felurze, a little south of here. Our parents made the arrangement years ago. He'll be of age next year, and then come up to Tychris so we can be wed. I just hope to the gods he never finds out about any of this..." "You think he would be upset about what [var0 |you and Cait have |we've ] been doing?" She shakes her head. "I don't know, but I'm sure he'd never let me live it down. He's a little shit like that, always teasing me about something! If it's not about how I act, it's about some little this-and-that from ten years ago... and if he runs out of ammunition he'll just say I have fat tits." Kythie pouts, crossing her arms under her fat tits. "Sounds like you're good friends, at least?" "Eh, I mean, I guess. I only see him once or twice a year, but we get on. At least, we put in the effort to. Our parents are all really invested in seeing this marriage play out." "Why is that?" And more importantly, you wonder, who would benefit from destabilizing it. Kythie sighs. "That's, well it's, um, complicated. You've seen my dad. A stiff breeze would blow him over. Grandpa, Uncle, my great-aunt, it's all kind of the same. I'm the first member of the family born anything but sickly in living memory. The clerics of Nareva said we need to stop marrying nobles from our own court; that foreign blood will save us from the decline. Mom kinda proved that it's moving in the right direction, at least." [pc.bg scholar |It sounds like the point is to undo a little too much inbreeding up here in Tychris. Old Belhar used to have the same problem, as you recall; several emperors who came from the union of cousins proved to be unstable. Better to be physically frail than mentally, you suppose. |You wonder if the royal was already under some kind of curse... ] "So, do you really think he cares about your, well, maidenhead?" you ask. "It's certainly important to your parents." Kythie glances away. "I don't think he does, but his parents do. The feeling's mutual, I guess. Dad's not the only one concerned with bloodlines; my fiancee's parents only agreed to the arrangement on the assurance that their son would plant his seed in my womb, ensuring their blood became the next rulers of Tychris. And the best way to assure that is my chastity. The contract's ironclad, oathsworn before Nareva and Tira." "And what does your prince think about all of this?" "I, uh," Kythie's ears flatten against her head. "I don't know. It's our duty. He knows that as well as I do. He's a twerp, but still puts in the effort to be tolerable." [pc.bg minstrel noblescion courtesan |You've heard this story before. It's a rare thing for promised couples to be enthusiastically in love; the best they can hope for is a quiet toleration that blooms into better. But Kythie's response leaves you wondering. "You're an incredible woman, Kythie. He should be over the moon." "Yeah! But, like, I mean, he's just..." Kythie's cheeks flush, and she squeezes her own fingers. "He's always... he's never been interested in me like that. Not like Mom and Dad were when they were in our shoes. It's, I guess it's just kind of disappointing. I don't get the childhood friend romance, or the prince charming with love at first sight. And he just gets... me." Could it be that the Prince of Felurze would want to break off this engagement himself? ] "

rows.translation: 她的订婚事宜

rows.original: Kythie draws in a breath when you ask the question, and then glances sharply away. "That's, uhm, why do you ask...?" You cross your arms. "What's going on with you?" "Nothing!" Kythie insists. "I was just interested, that's all." "Interested in what? Those books aren't exactly easy reading, Kythie." The princess squirms uncomfortably under your inquiring gaze, before finally slumping her shoulders when you refuse to relent. "I was researching something. Someone." Her tail flops into her lap, and she rubs at the smooth blue scales. "Myself." "[pc.isDK|Narcisistic much?"|You think you're going to find yourself in a bunch of old books?"] Kythie waves her hands. "N-no, not like that! Just, sometimes I have strange dreams. Since before the whole curse thing even started, like since I was a kid. I have these really vivid dreams about dragons, and the sea — I've never been to the sea! I thought those books might help, but honestly, I barely understood anything in there. It might as well have been in Macahn for all I could tell. I tried talking to Vasko about it, asked him to help me puzzle out what they were saying, but after a few hours he was more frustrated with me than I was at the books! I just ended up taking them back to the temple..." "So, these dreams... have they changed at all lately?" "You mean since the curse? I... sort of..." Kythie [kythie.lowLibido |blushes a little, and her ears flatten against her scalp. |licks her lips, and her see the flame on her tail start burning a little more intently. ] "The dreams used to be about flying in the open sky, or breathing fire on monsters, or perching up on the top of the palace and just basking in the sun... but now every night I dream about being bred. I'm a huge and powerful and beautiful dragon, and [kythie.fucked |a hero — like you — |a beautiful paladin like Cait ] comes to lift my tail and just ravish me until I'm so full of eggs I can barely move." Kythie presses her thighs together. "And then I wake up and I'm knuckles-deep in myself, drenched in sweat, feeling like my womb's so empty! Like an ache I can't shake off." You [pc.isCunning |whistle |let out a breath ]. That's a hell of a thing. "When did these dreams start?" She shrugs. "I can't really remember a time before it. Dad used to read me stories about dragons, when I was a baby. He said we were descended from them. All salamanders are, and that's why Nareva chose Tychris as her new stronghold, during the Godswar! When the dreams started, I just thought it meant Nareva loved me. [kythie.lowLibido |Not so sure about that now... |Now it seems like she just wants me to get packed full of eggs, like a dragon broodmother! ] So... sorry I didn't really want to mention it before. It's weird!" [ashe.around |Ashe vibrates at your side. "Ask her what color of dragon she is in her dreams." Okay, sure. "Do you remember what you looked like as a dragon? What colored scales?" Kythie makes an embarrassed noise in her throat. "I... remember once I flew over a lake, and shone like a coat of gold and pearls in my reflection. When the light caught my scales, it was blinding. I was like Dad's crown reshaped into a winged tyrant that could rule an empire. I've never felt so powerful, or so beautiful..." You glance down at Ashe. "Sounds familiar..." "Really?" "I'll tell you about it sometime." |[var0 |If Kythie's dreaming of a dragon... you don't know if there's any actual connection, but you do know a dragon not all that far away that's suffering for want of someone with royal blood. Maybe that could be a cure for the horny princess? Ashe's draconic power might be able to break its hold on her! ] ]
rows.translation: 当你提出这个问题的时候，Kythie突然吸了一口气，然后迅速将目光移开了。“那个，呃，你为什么这么问……？” 你双臂交叉：“你到底怎么了？” “没什么！”Kythie坚称，“我只是有点好奇而已。” “好奇什么？ 什么那些书其实不太容易读，Kythie。” 公主在你的询问目光下显得很不自在，最终在你坚持不让步的情况下，她只好耸了耸肩。“我当时在研究一些东西……一个她的尾巴垂在腿上，她轻轻抚摸着那些光滑的蓝色鳞片。“就是我啊。[pc.isDK|有点自恋了吧？|你以为自己会在一堆旧书里找到什么吗？] Kythie挥了挥手，说道：“不，不是那样的！只是有时候我会做一些奇怪的梦。其实早在整个诅咒事件开始之前，从我还是个孩子的时候就开始有了这样的梦。 真的 我经常做关于龙和海洋的生动梦境，不过这种事情我以前从未经历过。 已经 真是无济于事！我本来以为那些书能帮上忙，但说实话，我根本看不懂里面写的是什么。对我来说，那些内容简直就像是用Macahn语言写的一样。我试着跟Vasko讨论这些内容，请他帮我弄清楚那些文字的意思，但几个小时后，他对我感到沮丧的程度，甚至超过了我对那些书的困惑！最后，我只好把那些书重新放回寺庙里去了……” “那么，这些梦……最近有没有什么变化吗？” “你是说自从那个诅咒出现之后吗？我……有点吧……”Kythie说道。 [kythie.lowLibido |她的脸微微一红，耳朵也贴在了头皮上。 |她舔了舔嘴唇，这时她看到自己尾巴上的火焰燃烧得更加旺盛了。 ] 过去的梦想总是关于在广阔的天空中飞翔，或是向怪物喷火，或是站在宫殿的顶端沐浴阳光……但现在却不一样了。 每晚我都会梦到自己被繁衍出来的情景。我是一条庞大、强大而美丽的龙，而且…… [kythie.fucked |像你这样的英雄 |像凯特这样美丽的圣骑士 ] 过来帮我把尾巴抬起来，就这样。 迷住 直到我肚子里塞满了东西，动都动不了。” 凯西把大腿紧紧夹在一起，继续说道：“然后当我醒来时，发现自己的身上沾满了自己的分泌物，满身是汗，感觉自己的子宫仿佛…… 空荡荡的就像一种我无法摆脱的痛苦。 [pc.isCunning |口哨 |松了一口气 ]那可真是件了不起的事情……这些梦是从什么时候开始的呢？” 她耸了耸肩：“我真的想不起来在那个之前有什么特别的记忆。我小时候，爸爸经常给我讲关于龙的故事，他说我们都是龙的后裔。所有的蝾螈都是，也就是为什么在神战期间，纳雷瓦会选择提克里斯作为她的新据点！当这些梦开始出现的时候，我以为只是因为纳雷瓦爱我罢了。 [kythie.lowLibido |现在我不太确定了…… |现在看来，她似乎就是想让我变得像一条龙的雌性守护者一样，浑身布满蛋！ ] 所以……很抱歉，我之前其实并不想提到这件事。真是有点奇怪啊！ [ashe.around |阿什站在你身边，轻声说道：“去问问她，在梦中她想象中的龙是什么颜色的。” “好吧，没问题。”你问道，“你还记得自己变成龙时的样子吗？那鳞片是什么颜色的？” 基西喉咙里发出一声尴尬的声响。 我……记得有一次，我飞过一片湖泊，我的身躯在湖水中反射出金光与珍珠般的光芒。当光芒照射到我的鳞片上时，那光芒简直令人睁不开眼。那时，我就像爸爸的王冠被改造成了一个拥有翅膀的暴君，一个能够统治整个帝国的存在。 我从未感觉自己如此强大，如此美丽……” 你低头看了看艾希，说道：“听起来有点耳熟……” “真的吗？” “改天我会告诉你这件事的。 |[var0 |如果凯西梦见了一条龙……虽然你不确定这两者之间是否存在真正的联系，但你知道，在不远处确实有一条龙，因为它缺乏拥有王室血脉的生物而陷入困境。或许，这正是治愈这位欲望旺盛的公主的关键？艾什拥有的龙之力，或许能够解除它对她的控制！ ] ]

rows.translation: 梦想与巨龙

rows.original: "So, who's Laz?" you ask. "And why does he need to apologize to you so badly?" "Oh, [kythie.lowLibido |fu- ahh! |fuck! ]" Kythie groans. "You didn't need to see that..." You put your hands on your hips. "It could be important." "It's not! It's private! That [kythie.lowLibido |Laz |stupid brat or a boy ] is Lazaran en Felurze — my betrothed. His uncle passed me a personal letter from my fiance when he came to see the Tycathalon, and that's all." The princess is seething — and something tells you it's about more than just having her mail read. [kythie.lowLibido |You [pc.isDK |frown |put a hand on her shoulder, feeling the warmth rising to the surface in her. Uh-oh. ] "Take it easy. Just tell me what happened." |You put your hands up, watching with alarm as Kythie starts huffing and puffing. "Take it easy. I just want to know what happened. No need to get worked up." ] Kythie [kythie.lowLibido |sighs, stepping away from you. |snarls, flinching away when you step closer. ] "It's none of your business, [pc.name]! It's not the curse making me angry, it's that idiot boy and his stupid- grah!" She doubles at the waist, clutching at her head. Her tail-flame blazes behind in, a roiling cascade of boreal colors. "Stupid, stupid, stupid! Right in my own gardens!" [pc.isBimbo |You quickly close the distance, grab Kythie's hands, and yank her into a big, squishy hug. The princess squirms, trying to fight back, before finally sighing and slumping into your embrace. "Sorry..." "It's okay," you say, petting her hair. "Do you want to talk about it?" A few long seconds pass. "My stupid fiance... Laz, he... I've known him since we were little. I thought we'd be together forever. But he doesn't love me! He never has!" Kythie groans. "There's a priestess, Glys, who's like... like a handmaiden to his family, I guess? Her mother was Laz's wetnurse. I thought she was nice, but she seduced Lazaran! I walked in on them kissing! It was bullshit and horrible and I keep seeing it every other time I close my eyes and, and, ahhhhh!" You stroke the princess's hair and hold her close. There, there. She chokes back an angry sob, before finally pushing away and flopping onto her bed. |"Calm down!" "Fuck you!" Kythie snaps, throwing herself onto her bed. "Fuck you, fuck him, fuck everybody!" She pounds her fists on the mattress and screams into the pillow. ] Seems like Kythie's done talking for now. You turn back to the door and give it a knock. If there was a squabble between Kythie and her fiance in the gardens, they might be worth taking a look at...
rows.translation: 那么，拉兹到底是谁？”你问道，“为什么他非得向你道歉呢？” “哦， [kythie.lowLibido |呼——啊！ |该死！ ]凯西呻吟道：‘你没必要看到那个……’” 你双手叉腰说道：“但这可能很重要。” “不重要！那是私人的事情！那个…… [kythie.lowLibido |拉兹 |那个愚蠢的家伙……或者说，那个男孩…… ] 拉扎兰·恩·费卢尔泽就是我的未婚夫。他的叔叔在来参加泰卡塔隆仪式时，把我的未婚夫写给我的一封私人信件交给了我，仅此而已。 这位公主现在怒火中烧——而且你可以肯定，这件事的原因远不止是她的信被别人读了这么简单。 [kythie.lowLibido |你 [pc.isDK |皱眉 |我把手放在她的肩上，感受到她体内涌起的温暖。哦不…… ] 别紧张，只要告诉我发生了什么就行。 |你举起了手，惊恐地注视着凯西开始气喘吁吁的样子。“别紧张，我只是想知道发生了什么。没必要这么激动。 ] 基西 [kythie.lowLibido |叹息着，从你身边走开了。 |当你靠近时，它们会发出低吼声，然后迅速躲开。 ] 这不关你的事。 [pc.name]不是那个诅咒让我生气，而是那个蠢货男孩和他那些愚蠢的行为——啊！”她弯下腰，双手抱头，尾巴后面的火焰绽放出绚丽的色彩。“真是太蠢了，太蠢了…… 愚蠢的! 就在我的地盘上！" [pc.isBimbo |你迅速拉近距离，抓住凯西的手，将她紧紧抱在怀里。这位公主挣扎着想要反抗，但最终还是叹了口气，软软地靠在了你的怀里。“对不起……” “没关系，”你一边说，一边轻抚着她的头发。 你想谈谈这件事吗？” 几秒钟过去了。“我那个愚蠢的未婚夫……拉兹，他……我们从小就认识了。我原以为我们会永远在一起。但他并不爱我！他从来都没有爱过我！ 基西呻吟道：“有个女祭司，名叫格利斯，她差不多算是拉扎尔家族的贴身侍女吧？她的母亲还是拉兹的奶妈。我本来觉得她人挺好的，可她却勾引了拉扎兰！我亲眼看到他们接吻的！太恶心了，太糟糕了……每次我闭上眼睛，都会看到那一幕，啊……你轻抚着公主的头发，将她紧紧抱在怀里。好了，好了。她强忍着愤怒的泪水，最终推开了你，扑倒在床上。 |冷静点！” “去你的！”凯西怒吼着，扑到床上。“去你的，去他的，去所有人的！” 她用拳头猛击床垫，对着枕头大声尖叫。 ] 看来Kythie暂时不再说话了。你转身走向门，敲了敲门。 如果Kythie和她的未婚夫在花园里发生了争执，或许去看看他们的情况会比较好……
rows.raw: ' "So, who's Laz?" you ask. "And why does he need to apologize to you so badly?" "Oh, [kythie.lowLibido |fu- ahh! |fuck! ]" Kythie groans. "You didn't need to see that..." You put your hands on your hips. "It could be important." "It's not! It's private! That [kythie.lowLibido |Laz |stupid brat or a boy ] is Lazaran en Felurze — my betrothed. His uncle passed me a personal letter from my fiance when he came to see the Tycathalon, and that's all." The princess is seething — and something tells you it's about more than just having her mail read. [kythie.lowLibido |You [pc.isDK |frown |put a hand on her shoulder, feeling the warmth rising to the surface in her. Uh-oh. ] "Take it easy. Just tell me what happened." |You put your hands up, watching with alarm as Kythie starts huffing and puffing. "Take it easy. I just want to know what happened. No need to get worked up." ] Kythie [kythie.lowLibido |sighs, stepping away from you. |snarls, flinching away when you step closer. ] "It's none of your business, [pc.name]! It's not the curse making me angry, it's that idiot boy and his stupid- grah!" She doubles at the waist, clutching at her head. Her tail-flame blazes behind in, a roiling cascade of boreal colors. "Stupid, stupid, stupid! Right in my own gardens!" [pc.isBimbo |You quickly close the distance, grab Kythie's hands, and yank her into a big, squishy hug. The princess squirms, trying to fight back, before finally sighing and slumping into your embrace. "Sorry..." "It's okay," you say, petting her hair. "Do you want to talk about it?" A few long seconds pass. "My stupid fiance... Laz, he... I've known him since we were little. I thought we'd be together forever. But he doesn't love me! He never has!" Kythie groans. "There's a priestess, Glys, who's like... like a handmaiden to his family, I guess? Her mother was Laz's wetnurse. I thought she was nice, but she seduced Lazaran! I walked in on them kissing! It was bullshit and horrible and I keep seeing it every other time I close my eyes and, and, ahhhhh!" You stroke the princess's hair and hold her close. There, there. She chokes back an angry sob, before finally pushing away and flopping onto her bed. |"Calm down!" "Fuck you!" Kythie snaps, throwing herself onto her bed. "Fuck you, fuck him, fuck everybody!" She pounds her fists on the mattress and screams into the pillow. ] Seems like Kythie's done talking for now. You turn back to the door and give it a knock. If there was a squabble between Kythie and her fiance in the gardens, they might be worth taking a look at... '

rows.original: [var0 |You and Cait exchange a look. "I think that's all we needed for now." "Alright, if you're sure," the princess laments. "Cait, could you, um, stay for a while? I, well, I can-" "It's okay, sweetheart, you don't have to say," Cait says, giving you a wink. "I've got you." Kythie smiles, even if she's blushing like a rose. You give Cait's [cait.fucked |ass |shoulder ] a squeeze and go knock on the door, taking your leave. Tethys bars the door again behind you, sighing to herself as she does so. "I hope you've learned something useful, [pc.name]." [pc.isDK |Quit nagging, woman, you'll get on it when you get to it. |You're working on it, you're working on it... ] |[kythie.lowLibido |"I'll get back to it," you say, turning towards the door. "[pc.isDK |Try not to schlick yourself silly while I'm gone." Kythie groans. "I'm fine! For now. Jerk. |Are you going to be okay?" Kythie shrugs. "As much as I can be. The fire's never gone, but... it's embering now, thanks to you. ] I'm sure you'll hear about it when it starts blazing." The whole town will if you let it get too far. |"I've got to get back to it," you say — and instantly feel Kythie's tail wrapping around your leg for the trouble. "Do you have to...?" Kythie murmurs, biting her lip. The way she's leaning forward now puts her whole cleavage on display, stiff nipples jutting through the fabric of her chest-straps. "Not to be a bother, but I could use your company a bit longer." You can feel the effort it's taking her to be demure; her tail-muscles are flexing, trying to keep you from pulling away. "Kythie..." Her chest heaves beneath its struggling restraints, and you see a dangerous glint in her eyes... before she draws in a deep breath and squeezes her fists, forcing herself to let you go. "Please, hurry back. I don't know how much longer I can hold out." "I will." ] You turn and give the door a heavy knock. Tethys lets you out, and you glance over your shoulder at the lonely princess as it's barred back behind you again. "I pray you have learned something useful, Champion," Tethys says quietly. "You [pc.hasKids |can only |cannot begin ] to imagine how much I hate this, every time." [pc.isDK |"I'm working on it!" you huff. The nagging isn't helping! |"I'm trying my best, Lady Tethys," you insist. ] ]

失败

rows.original:
You cast a wary glance towards the Cathedral of Nareva overlooking the plaza as you approach the statue, hand around your charm. Already you can feel a resonance building in the air like a charge, growing with each step you take closer to the stone salamander. 

		Sure enough, a couple of black-scaled warriors being approaching you, but their expressions are more curious than hostile, and they make no effort to stop you as you close the distance, establishing the connection between your charm and the Waystone Idol. Finally, the magic discharges, and the statue's gem begins to glow, casting an azure hue across the palace grounds.
		
		Rather than reprimand you, one of the paladins just runs her claws through her hair. "Huh. Usually stops glowing after somebody does that."
		
		The other nods at you. "Hey, if it works, it works."
		
		Guess you didn't need to be worried after all.
rows.translation:
当你走近那座雕像时，警惕地瞥了一眼矗立在广场上方的纳雷瓦大教堂，同时手中不断转动着那枚护身符。你已经感觉到空气中有一种逐渐增强的气息，就像一种能量正在积聚，而每当你靠近那座石制蝾螈雕像一步，这种能量就会变得更加强烈。 

		果然，有几位黑鳞战士正向你走来，但他们的表情更多是出于好奇，而非敌意。当你逐渐靠近他们，建立起你的魅力与路石神像之间的联系时，他们也没有试图阻止你。 终于，魔法能量释放了出来，雕像上的宝石开始发光，将蔚蓝色的光芒洒满了整个宫殿庭院。

那位圣骑士并没有责备你，而是只是用爪子捋了捋自己的头发，说道：“哼，通常别人这么做之后，宝石就会停止发光的。另一个人向你点了点头，说道：“嘿，如果真的有效的话，那当然没问题。”

看来你其实根本不需要担心嘛。
rows.raw:
'
        You cast a wary glance towards the Cathedral of Nareva overlooking the plaza as you approach the statue, hand around your charm. Already you can feel a resonance building in the air like a charge, growing with each step you take closer to the stone salamander. 

		Sure enough, a couple of black-scaled warriors being approaching you, but their expressions are more curious than hostile, and they make no effort to stop you as you close the distance, establishing the connection between your charm and the Waystone Idol. Finally, the magic discharges, and the statue's gem begins to glow, casting an azure hue across the palace grounds.
		
		Rather than reprimand you, one of the paladins just runs her claws through her hair. "Huh. Usually stops glowing after somebody does that."
		
		The other nods at you. "Hey, if it works, it works."
		
		Guess you didn't need to be worried after all.'

rows.translation: 下一个

rows.original:
Tethys has given you the run of the place, and while her daughter might be the victim in this case, there could still be something critical in her bedroom. You don't even need to shake the Lady Consort down for a key: the handle's been smashed off, leaving a blossom of splintered wood in the doorframe. You push the door open and slip inside.

	Kythie's bedroom is about what you'd expect from a teenage noble: a curtained bed with thick, fluffy blankets of the same tartan colors common to her family; hefty chests of drawers, topped with jewelry boxes and flanked by a pair of standing mirrors — an expensive conceit, even for a noble; and a mahogany display table with her weighted throwing discs, scented body oils, and of course, her golden victory-laurels from the Tycathalon. 
	
	What do you want to investigate?
rows.translation:
泰西斯已经允许你自由行动了，虽然她的女儿在这件事中可能是受害者，但她的卧室里可能仍然藏着一些重要的东西。你甚至不需要强迫那位王后夫人交出钥匙：钥匙柄已经被敲掉了，门框上留着一堆木屑。 你推开门走了进去。

凯西的卧室完全符合人们对一位青少年贵族的期待：一张床前挂着帘子，上面铺着厚厚的、柔软的毯子，这些毯子的图案都是她家族常见的格子花纹；几个大衣柜，上面摆放着首饰盒，两侧还各有一面立式镜子——即使对于贵族来说，这也算是相当奢华的装饰了；此外，还有一张红木制的展示台，上面放着她用来投掷的石盘、香体油，当然，还有她在泰卡塔隆比赛中获得的金色胜利奖杯。 
	
	你想调查什么？
rows.raw:
"
	Tethys has given you the run of the place, and while her daughter might be the victim in this case, there could still be something critical in her bedroom. You don't even need to shake the Lady Consort down for a key: the handle's been smashed off, leaving a blossom of splintered wood in the doorframe. You push the door open and slip inside.

	Kythie's bedroom is about what you'd expect from a teenage noble: a curtained bed with thick, fluffy blankets of the same tartan colors common to her family; hefty chests of drawers, topped with jewelry boxes and flanked by a pair of standing mirrors — an expensive conceit, even for a noble; and a mahogany display table with her weighted throwing discs, scented body oils, and of course, her golden victory-laurels from the Tycathalon. 
	
	What do you want to investigate?"

rows.translation: 下一个

rows.original: You head over to the princess's dressing area: a stack of drawers topped with jewelry boxes, flanked by a pair of Kythie-sized standing mirrors. There's a padded stood for her to sit at while doing her hair, though it's currently playing home to stacks and stacks of tartan kilts and cloaks, all neatly folded. [pc.isBimbo | They've been here for a while, to your eye. Different fashions, threadbare and new mixed together. The princess doesn't really care about her clothes, does she? Just tosses them anywhere out of the way. She probably doesn't even use these gorgeous mirrors to do her hair and makeup for hours! What a waste! | Left here by the palace staff for when she returns, you'd guess. ] You figure you should start your investigation from the top and work your way down, so that makes the jewelry boxes first. She's got three in total: a pair of smaller boxes sitting open, each with a single necklace draped through it, one with a silver oroboros and another with a number of gold loops and diamonds. The central box has the real motherlode though: a selection of gold bangles and armlets, a pair of circlets, and many, many earrings. There's even a thick, silver-chased band that the rest of it sits inside that's far too big for her head... a tail-bangle, maybe? Nothing you wouldn't expect from a wealthy debutante, really. Time to rifle through her drawers, then. You pull each open in turn, revealing neatly-folded dresses, even more kilts... and there at the bottom, sets of white, rose-pink, and azure-blue panties. There's only a couple of bras in there, each one a masterwork of silk and ribbons, clearly meant for formal occasions. Most of the salamander women in this town go with their cleavage out as a matter of course. And... something's under one of those bras, now that you look at it. You brush the expensive negligee out of the way to reveal a small glass bottle, stoppered with a pink heart. You crack it open and take a whiff. Smells like the floral oils Cait's always carting around. A little personal lubricant for the princess's pleasure? You slip that back where you found it and take another look around...
rows.translation: 你走进公主的更衣室：一排抽屉上摆放着珠宝盒，两侧各有一面与Kythie身高相配的立式镜子。那里还有一张软垫凳，公主可以坐在上面梳头发，不过现在上面整齐地叠放着许多格子呢裙和斗篷。 [pc.isBimbo | 在你看来，他们已经在这里待了一段时间了。各种风格的衣服混杂在一起，有的破旧，有的崭新。那位公主其实并不太在意自己的衣服，对吧？她只是把它们随手扔到任何地方罢了。她大概甚至都不会用这些精美的镜子来花几个小时整理头发、化妆吧！真是太浪费了！ | 你大概会猜到，这是宫里的工作人员留下来等她回来的。 ] 你认为应该从最上面开始调查，然后逐层往下查，所以首先应该检查那些珠宝盒。她总共有三个珠宝盒：其中两个较小的盒子是敞开的，每个盒子里都挂着一条项链——一个盒子里装着一条银色的蛇形项链，另一个盒子里则装着几条金色的项链以及钻石。 不过，最珍贵的物品都在中间的那个盒子里：一些金手镯和金臂镯、一对耳环，还有许多耳钉。甚至还有一个银质边框，其他那些首饰都放在这个边框里，不过这个边框对她来说实在太大了，根本戴不上去。……也许还会发生一些尴尬的事情吧？ 对于一个富有的名门千金来说，这种事情其实也在意料之中。 那么，是时候翻翻她的抽屉了。你依次打开每一个抽屉，里面都整齐地叠放着连衣裙，还有更多的苏格兰裙。在底部，还摆放着白色、玫瑰粉色和天蓝色的内裤。里面的胸罩只有几件，每一件都是丝缎与丝带的杰作，显然是为正式场合准备的。这个小镇上的大多数女性都理所当然地选择将胸部裸露在外。 而且……仔细看的话，会发现其中一件胸罩下面藏着什么东西。你把那件昂贵的睡衣拨到一边，发现了一个用粉色心形图案封住的小玻璃瓶。你打开瓶子，闻了闻里面的气味。 闻起来像是凯特总是随身携带的那些花香精油。这是为公主准备的一点私人润滑剂吧？ 你把那个东西放回原来找到的地方，然后再仔细环顾四周……
rows.raw: " You head over to the princess's dressing area: a stack of drawers topped with jewelry boxes, flanked by a pair of Kythie-sized standing mirrors. There's a padded stood for her to sit at while doing her hair, though it's currently playing home to stacks and stacks of tartan kilts and cloaks, all neatly folded. [pc.isBimbo | They've been here for a while, to your eye. Different fashions, threadbare and new mixed together. The princess doesn't really care about her clothes, does she? Just tosses them anywhere out of the way. She probably doesn't even use these gorgeous mirrors to do her hair and makeup for hours! What a waste! | Left here by the palace staff for when she returns, you'd guess. ] You figure you should start your investigation from the top and work your way down, so that makes the jewelry boxes first. She's got three in total: a pair of smaller boxes sitting open, each with a single necklace draped through it, one with a silver oroboros and another with a number of gold loops and diamonds. The central box has the real motherlode though: a selection of gold bangles and armlets, a pair of circlets, and many, many earrings. There's even a thick, silver-chased band that the rest of it sits inside that's far too big for her head... a tail-bangle, maybe? Nothing you wouldn't expect from a wealthy debutante, really. Time to rifle through her drawers, then. You pull each open in turn, revealing neatly-folded dresses, even more kilts... and there at the bottom, sets of white, rose-pink, and azure-blue panties. There's only a couple of bras in there, each one a masterwork of silk and ribbons, clearly meant for formal occasions. Most of the salamander women in this town go with their cleavage out as a matter of course. And... something's under one of those bras, now that you look at it. You brush the expensive negligee out of the way to reveal a small glass bottle, stoppered with a pink heart. You crack it open and take a whiff. Smells like the floral oils Cait's always carting around. A little personal lubricant for the princess's pleasure? You slip that back where you found it and take another look around... "

rows.translation: 她的衣橱

rows.original:
You cast a glance towards the door, then surreptitiously slip the gold necklaces from Kythie's jewelry boxes into your pockets, and then when no guards or wards spring into action, help yourself to the rest that's piled up in that big box, right down to the tail bangle. 

	This will net you a tidy profit somewhere...
rows.translation:
你朝门口瞥了一眼，然后偷偷地将凯西首饰盒里的金项链都塞进了自己的口袋。当没有守卫或防护装置发出警报时，你又把那个大盒子里剩下的所有首饰都拿走了，甚至连脚链也没放过。

这样，你肯定能赚一笔可观的利润……
rows.raw:
"
    You cast a glance towards the door, then surreptitiously slip the gold necklaces from Kythie's jewelry boxes into your pockets, and then when no guards or wards spring into action, help yourself to the rest that's piled up in that big box, right down to the tail bangle. 

	This will net you a tidy profit somewhere...
    "

rows.translation: 下一个

rows.original: Kythie's got a luxurious four-posted bed, surrounded by a sheer veil of white cloth. Not silk — that's evident once you brush your fingers over it — but the threadwork is of such quality that it's hard to tell the difference at a glance. The bedding itself is just as well-made, stuffed with goosefeathers and gently scented with rosepetals. No, not with them: looking up at the top of the canopy, you see a runestone cleverly hidden in the canopy, blending in with the woodwork and brass. Using magic just to make sure the crown princess gets to sleep to the scent of flowers. Talk about luxury. You heft up the skirt of the bed and poke your head under, expecting to find something down there to search through, only to come away disappointed. Nothing down there but a few extra stacks of throwing discs arranged to give the underside of the bed a little more support. Might be Kythie's ass weighs a little more than the bed was made for. Next, you check the blankets and the pillow, patting them down for anything out of place, hidden in the stitching or... or inside a pillow. Something crinkles like paper under the bottom of one of the many pillows strewn about the bed, one ill-favored by the princess going by how far off to the side it's been shoved. "Hmm, what have we here..." You open the pillow up and reach into the thick feather stuffing, feeling around for... there we go. A neatly-folded square of parchment, hidden away from view. [party.has cait |"Oooooh," Cait croons, swishing her tail. "Calla used to do the same thing. Though it was usually little snacks she stole from the kitchen. What's it say?" ] When you unfold the paper, you're greeted by the sight of neat, crisp penmanship in a maroon ink. Expensive, and written by someone well-educated. My dear Thiea, I hope you can forgive me sending this via my uncle Asher rather than speaking in person, but Mother's too ill to make the trip for the Tycathalon. I will be praying for your glory from here! Would that I could have seen you myself, Thiea. I miss your hugs. Have you calmed yourself from that episode during my last visit? I am truly sorry you saw that. I can only beg your forgiveness so many times! I only hope you know it was never my intention to hurt you. Yet — Sister Glysera has been my dearest companion for so many years, and I cannot help but follow where my heart has led me. Of course, I wouldn't begrudge you the same dalliances. You are still, now, as ever, my friend. I sincerely desire that you be happy, and to follow your heart wherever it takes you. Can you find it in your heart to afford me the same? Fate has bound you and I together since birth. I can only hope an indiscreet kiss has not ruined our friendship. I harbor no illusions about love, but life will be unbearable for both of us if there's to be more yelling and scratching as when we last saw one another. For whatever it's worth, I truly wish my heart had led me to you. Perhaps it will some day? I pray to Velun and Mallach that it does. For now, though, try as I might, it will not change its course. Please write back. The silence has been unbearable. Your friend, always, -Laz [party.has cait |"Poor Kythie," Cait sighs. ] Well now... somebody's left the princess feeling awfully spurned, looks like. Maybe you should ask Kythie about it, when she's up for talk.
rows.translation: Kythie拥有一张豪华的四柱床，床周围悬挂着一层纯白色的纱帘。虽然这不是丝绸——只要用手指轻轻触碰就能立刻察觉到——但这种织法的质量实在太高，一眼看去根本无法区分它们。床上的被褥也同样制作精良，里面填充着鹅毛，还散发着淡淡的玫瑰花瓣香气。不，其实并不是…… 与……一起 抬头望去，你会看到树冠的顶部有一块巧妙地隐藏在那里的石碑，它的颜色与木结构和黄铜装饰融为了一体。 人们运用魔法，只是为了让王储公主能够在花香中入睡。 这可真是奢华到了极点。 你掀开床帘，把头伸了进去，本以为下面会有什么可以翻找的东西，结果却大失所望——下面什么也没有，只有几叠额外的飞盘，它们被摆放在那里，只是为了让床底能够得到更多的支撑而已。 也许凯西的屁股确实有点太重了，以至于这张床根本不是为她设计的…… 接下来，你检查了毯子和枕头，轻轻拍打它们，看看有没有什么不寻常的东西藏在缝线里，或者……藏在枕头里面。在床铺上散落的那些枕头中，有一个枕头的底部似乎有什么东西在皱缩，那枕头被公主扔到了床的边上，看样子它是那些枕头中“最不受宠”的那个。 嗯，这里面有什么呢……” 你打开枕头，将手伸进厚厚的羽毛填充物中，四处摸索着……终于找到了。一张折叠得整整齐齐的羊皮纸，被巧妙地藏在了那里。 [party.has cait |哦哦哦，”凯特轻声说道，同时摇着尾巴。“卡拉以前也经常这么做。不过她通常会从厨房里偷一些小零食来。这是什么意思呢？ ] 当你展开这张纸时，映入眼帘的是用深红色墨水书写而成的工整、清晰的字迹。这种墨水价格昂贵，而且显然出自一位受过良好教育的人之手。 亲爱的Thiea， 希望你能原谅我没有亲自去找你，而是通过我的叔叔Asher来告诉你这个消息。母亲的身体太差了，无法赶去参加Tycathalon活动。在这里，我会为你的荣耀而祈祷！真希望我能亲自见到你，Thiea……我真的很想念你的拥抱。 在我上次拜访之后，你有没有平静下来，从那段经历中走出来呢？我真的为让你看到了那些事情而感到非常抱歉。我只能一遍又一遍地恳求你的原谅！我只希望你能明白，我从来都没有伤害你的意图。 然而——格莉塞拉姐姐多年来一直是我最亲密的伙伴，我实在无法抗拒自己内心的冲动，只能跟随自己的心去选择道路。 当然，我也不会介意你也有类似的恋情。你现在，也一如既往地，是我的朋友。我真心希望你能幸福，希望你能追随自己的内心去选择任何道路。那么，你能否也在我心中给予我同样的尊重与理解呢？ 命中注定，我们从出生起就被绑在了一起。我只希望那个轻率的吻没有破坏我们的友谊。我对爱情并不抱有任何幻想，但如果再像上次见面时那样，总是争吵和争执，我们的生活将会变得无法忍受。 无论这有什么意义，我真心希望自己的内心能引导我找到你。也许有一天它会实现呢？我向维伦和玛拉赫祈祷，希望如此。不过目前来说，无论我如何努力，它的方向都无法改变。 请给我回信吧。这种沉默让我实在无法忍受。 你的朋友，永远陪伴在你身边， ——拉兹 [party.has cait |可怜的凯西，”凯特叹息道。 ] 嗯，现在…… 有人让那位公主感到被深深抛弃了。看起来是这样。也许你应该等Kythie有空的时候，问问她这件事。

Not silk — that's evident once you brush your fingers over it — but the threadwork is of such quality that it's hard to tell the difference at a glance. No, not with them: looking up at the top of the canopy, you see a runestone cleverly hidden in the canopy, blending in with the woodwork and brass. What's it say?" ] When you unfold the paper, you're greeted by the sight of neat, crisp penmanship in a maroon ink. Expensive, and written by someone well-educated. I am truly sorry you saw that. I can only beg your forgiveness so many times! I only hope you know it was never my intention to hurt you.
